country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.2157 #1935年《缅甸政府法》

	title = burma.1.t # Government of Burma Act 1935

	desc = burma.1.d

	picture = gfx/event_pictures/burma_government_house.dds

	

	trigger = {

		TAG = ENG

		date > 1937.4.1

		date < 1939.1.1

        country_exists = RAJ

		NOT = { has_global_flag = burma_act }

	}



	mean_time_to_happen = {

		days = 2

	}

	fire_only_once = yes

	immediate = {

		set_global_flag = burma_act

	}

	

	option = { #Keep playing ENG

		name = burma.1.a

		custom_effect_tooltip = burma_spawn_tooltip

		hidden_effect = {

			if = {

				limit = {

					288 = {

						OR = {

							is_owned_by = RAJ

							is_owned_by = ENG

						}

					}

				}

				BUR = { transfer_state = 288 }

				RAJ = { remove_state_core = 288 }

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					640 = {

						OR = {

							is_owned_by = RAJ

							is_owned_by = ENG

						}

					}

				}

				BUR = { transfer_state = 640 }

				RAJ = { remove_state_core = 640 }

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					992 = {

						OR = {

							is_owned_by = RAJ

							is_owned_by = ENG

						}

					}

				}

				BUR = { transfer_state = 992 }

				RAJ = { remove_state_core = 992 }

			}

            if = {

				limit = {

					993 = {

						OR = {

							is_owned_by = RAJ

							is_owned_by = ENG

						}

					}

				}

				BUR = { transfer_state = 993 }

				RAJ = { remove_state_core = 993 }

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					1021 = {

						OR = {

							is_owned_by = RAJ

							is_owned_by = ENG

						}

					}

				}

				BUR = { transfer_state = 1021 }

				RAJ = { remove_state_core = 1021 }

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					has_dlc = "Together for Victory"			

				}

				ENG = {

					set_autonomy = {

					target = BUR

					autonomous_state = autonomy_ENG_baohuguo

					freedom_level = 0.35

				}

			}

				else = {

					puppet = BUR

				}

			}			

			RAJ = { country_event = AWR_CHI.2158 }

			BUR = { set_cosmetic_tag = BUR_UK }

			BUR = { add_state_core = 288 }

			BUR = { add_state_core = 640 }

			BUR = { add_state_core = 992 }

    		BUR = { add_state_core = 993 }

			BUR = { add_state_core = 1021 }

    		BUR = { load_oob = BUR_1937 }

			BUR = {	

				add_ideas = agrarion_society_generic_3

				add_equipment_to_stockpile = {

					type = artillery_equipment_1

					amount = 50

					producer = "RAJ"

				}

			}

			BUR = {

				add_equipment_to_stockpile = {

					type = infantry_equipment_1

					amount = 300

					producer = "RAJ"

				}

			}

			BUR = { 

				set_politics = { 

					ruling_party = neutrality

					last_election = "1936.11.26"

					election_frequency = 48

					elections_allowed = no

				}

				set_political_party = {

					ideology = democratic popularity = 51

					ideology = fascism popularity = 1

					ideology = communism popularity = 1

					ideology = neutrality popularity = 47

				}

			}

		}

	}



	option = { #Swap to BUR

		name = burma.1.b

		custom_effect_tooltip = burma_swap_tooltip

		hidden_effect = {

			BUR = { change_tag_from = ENG }

			if = {

				limit = {

					288 = {

						OR = {

							is_owned_by = RAJ

							is_owned_by = ENG

						}

					}

				}

				BUR = { transfer_state = 288 }

				RAJ = { remove_state_core = 288 }

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					640 = {

						OR = {

							is_owned_by = RAJ

							is_owned_by = ENG

						}

					}

				}

				BUR = { transfer_state = 640 }

				RAJ = { remove_state_core = 640 }

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					992 = {

						OR = {

							is_owned_by = RAJ

							is_owned_by = ENG

						}

					}

				}

				BUR = { transfer_state = 992 }

				RAJ = { remove_state_core = 992 }

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					993 = {

						OR = {

							is_owned_by = RAJ

							is_owned_by = ENG

						}

					}

				}

				BUR = { transfer_state = 993 }

				RAJ = { remove_state_core = 993 }

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					1021 = {

						OR = {

							is_owned_by = ENG

					}

			BUR = { add_state_core = 288 }

			BUR = { add_state_core = 992 }

    		BUR = { add_state_core = 993 }

					}

				}

			}

				640 = {

						type = arms_factory level = 1 instant_build = yes

					}

			limit = { PRC = { has_country_flag = CCW_minor_attack } }

			add_political_power = -25

			add_manpower = -500

		}

		PRC = {

			country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.2217 }

			clr_country_flag = CCW_major_attack

			clr_country_flag = CCW_medium_attack

			clr_country_flag = CCW_minor_attack

		}

	}

}

		}

					}

		}

						tag = ATM

					}

				}

				#has_global_flag = JAP_attacks_CHI_unites

				OR = {

					HPC = {

						has_war_with = JAP

						has_war_with = JAP

					}

					AND = {

						HPC = {

							is_puppet_of = JAP

						}

							has_war_with = JAP

						}

					}

				}

				#JAP = { has_offensive_war = yes }

				NOT = {

					is_subject_of = JAP

				}

				NOT = {

					has_war_with = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader

				}

				OR = {

					is_in_faction = no

					owns_state = 614

					tag = SHD

					tag = NEA

				}

				OR = {

					has_war = no

		#	days = 15

					AND = {

			}

		}

	}

			modifier = {

				add = 100

				is_puppet = no

				OR = { #join commies

					has_country_flag = cooperation_with_communist_flag

						}

					}

				}

			}

					has_government = fascism

					has_country_flag = CHI_opposition_flag

				}

			}

			modifier = {

				}

			}

		}

		}

		}

		FROM = {

			remove_opinion_modifier = { target = JAP modifier = hostile_status }

		}

		every_state = {

			limit = {

				is_core_of = FROM

				OR = {

				    is_core_of = MAN

				    state = 745

				}

				#is_manchuria_state = yes

			}

			remove_core_of = FROM

			#remove_from_array = { #prolly not a good idea

			#	global.big_china = THIS

			#}

			#remove_from_array = {

			#	global.small_china = THIS

			#}

			clr_state_flag = china_core_state

		}

		hidden_effect = {

			FROM = {

				save_global_event_target_as = RCM_japan_friendly_china

				add_political_power = 120

				swap_ideas = { remove_idea = appeasement_policy add_idea = appeasement_policy_2 }

			}

			country_event = { days = 270 id = AWR_CHI.2387 }

			news_event = { id = AWR_CHI_news.639 }

			set_global_flag = CHI_accept_san_hiro

			if = {

				limit = {

					country_exists = NEA

				}

				NEA = {

					country_event = AWR_CHI.3296

				}

			}

		}

	}

}

		add_ace = { name = "Robert" surname = "Smith" callsign = "R.T." type = fighter_genius is_female = no }

		custom_effect_tooltip = CHI_flying_tiger_tt

			        }

	            else = {

                    set_technology = {

				        fighter1 = 1

				        tactical_bomber1 = 1

			        }

	            }

            }					

			if = {

	            limit = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }

		            load_oob = "CHI_flying_tiger_bba"

	            else = {

		            load_oob = "CHI_flying_tiger"

	            }

            }

		}		

	}

}

					has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

				}

				CHI = {

					if = {

						limit = {

							USA = {

								has_tech = improved_small_airframe

							}

						}

						add_equipment_to_stockpile = {

							type = small_plane_airframe_2

							amount = 350

							producer = USA

							#variant_name = "P-6"

						}

						else = {

							add_equipment_to_stockpile = {

								type = small_plane_airframe

								amount = 350

								producer = USA

								#variant_name = "P-6"

							}

						}

					}

					if = {

						limit = {

							USA = {

								has_tech = improved_medium_airframe

							}

						}

						add_equipment_to_stockpile = {

							type = medium_plane_airframe_2

							amount = 100

							producer = USA

							#variant_name = "P-6"

						}

						else = {

							add_equipment_to_stockpile = {

								type = medium_plane_airframe

								amount = 100

								producer = USA

								#variant_name = "P-6"

							}

						}

					}

					add_equipment_to_stockpile = {

						type = transport_plane_equipment

						amount = 20

						producer = ROOT

					}

				}

				add_doctrine_cost_reduction = {

					name = air_doc_bonus

					cost_reduction = 0.5

					uses = 1

					category = air_doctrine

				}

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }

				}

				CHI = {

					if = {

						limit = {

							USA = {

								has_tech = fighter2 

							}

						}

						add_equipment_to_stockpile = { 

							type = fighter_equipment_2 amount = 350

							producer = USA

						}

						else = {

							add_equipment_to_stockpile = { 

								type = small_plane_airframe amount = 350

								producer = USA

							}

						}

					}

					if = {

						limit = {

							USA = {

								has_tech = tactical_bomber2

							}

						}

						add_equipment_to_stockpile = { 

							type = tac_bomber_equipment_2 amount = 100

							producer = USA

						}

						else = {

							add_equipment_to_stockpile = { 

								type = medium_plane_airframe amount = 100

								producer = USA

							}

						}

					}

					add_equipment_to_stockpile = {

						type = transport_plane_equipment

						amount = 20

						producer = ROOT

					}

				}

				add_doctrine_cost_reduction = {

					name = air_doc_bonus

					cost_reduction = 0.5

					uses = 1

					category = air_doctrine

				}

			}

		}

		add_timed_idea = { idea = YUG_air_payment days = 90 }

		add_timed_idea = { idea = YUG_fighter_production_diverted days = 90 }

		add_timed_idea = { idea = YUG_bomber_production_diverted days = 90 }

	}

	option = {

		name = rcmchina.2076.b

		ai_chance = { factor = 0 }

		#no

		add_political_power = -50

		CHI = {

			country_event = {

			    id = AWR_CHI.3923 hours = 12

			}

		}

	}

}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.2383 #日本政府接受了停火协议

	title = rcmchina.284.t

	desc = rcmchina.284.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_chinese_officers

	is_triggered_only = yes

	immediate = {

		#all mainland troops return to home islands

		

		if = { #check if HPC somehow steals the leadership

			limit = {

				exists = yes

				has_country_flag = temp_current_china_leader

				NOT = {

					tag = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader

				}

			}

			event_target:WTT_current_china_leader = {

				if = {	limit = { NOT = { tag = ROOT } }

					set_variable = { global.previous_china_leader = THIS }

				}

			}

			clear_global_event_target = WTT_current_china_leader

			save_global_event_target_as = WTT_current_china_leader

		}

       hidden_effect = {		

		if = {

			limit = {	

		    614 = { is_owned_by = JAP }  		

                          }			

            614 = {

			set_state_owner_to = CHI

                          }

            }

		if = {

			limit = {	

		    614 = { is_owned_by = EHB }  		

                          }			

            614 = {

			set_state_owner_to = CHI

                          }

            }			

		if = {

			limit = {	

		    614 = { is_owned_by = HUA }  		

                          }			

            614 = {

			set_state_owner_to = CHI

                          }

            }

         }		

	    #hidden_effect = { #remove trigger will do

		#   remove_suiyuan_stronghold = yes

	    #}

	}

	option = {#RELEASE KOR

		name = rcmchina.284.a

		ai_chance = { factor = 100 }

		trigger = {

			NOT = {

				MAN = {

					OR = {

						controls_state = 527

						controls_state = 525

						controls_state = 1003

						controls_state = 1004

						controls_state = 1000

						controls_state = 1001

						controls_state = 999

						controls_state = 1002

					}

				}

			}

		}

		for_each_scope_loop = { #send Japan's troops back home

			array = global.big_china

			tooltip = big_china_tt

			teleport_armies = { 

				to_state = 282

				limit = {

					tag = JAP

					# trigger will be checked for owner of armies and will only teleport if true. scope if the owner of the army and prev is the scope that calls teleport_armies

				} 

			}

		}

		KOR = {

			every_owned_state = {

				teleport_armies = { 

					to_state = 282

					limit = {

						tag = JAP

						# trigger will be checked for owner of armies and will only teleport if true. scope if the owner of the army and prev is the scope that calls teleport_armies

					} 

				}

			}

			every_controlled_state = {

				teleport_armies = { 

					to_state = 282

					limit = {

						tag = JAP

						# trigger will be checked for owner of armies and will only teleport if true. scope if the owner of the army and prev is the scope that calls teleport_armies

					} 

				}

			}

		}

		hidden_effect = {

		CHI = {

            annex_country = { target = HUA }

            annex_country = { target = WEI }			

		}	

        615 = {

            remove_core_of = HUA

        }

        1027 = {

            remove_core_of = HUA

        }

        998 = {

            remove_core_of = HUA

        }

        1017 = {

            remove_core_of = HUA

        }

        608 = {

           remove_core_of = HUA

        }

        609 = {

            remove_core_of = HUA

        }

        614 = {

            remove_core_of = HUA

        }

        597 = {

            remove_core_of = HUA

        }

        1079 = {

            remove_core_of = HUA

        }

        1077 = {

            remove_core_of = HUA

        }

        743 = {

            remove_core_of = HUA

        }

        1028 = {

            remove_core_of = HUA

        }

        1067 = {

            remove_core_of = EHB

        }

        598 = {

            remove_core_of = WEI

        }		

        1080 = {

            remove_core_of = WEI

		}

		}

			save_event_target_as = old_leader

				limit = {

					OR = {

						has_cosmetic_tag = CHI_warlord_leader # warlord has taken over before this happened

						has_cosmetic_tag = CHI_warlord_PRC

						has_cosmetic_tag = CHI_second_republic_red

						has_cosmetic_tag = CHI_second_republic_blue

						has_cosmetic_tag = CHI_second_republic

					}

				}

				drop_cosmetic_tag = yes

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					tag = CHI

				}

				set_cosmetic_tag = CHI_power_struggle_defeated

			}

			FROM = {

				save_event_target_as = new_leader

				CHI_negative_spirit_transfer = yes

				if = {

					limit = {

						has_global_flag = lushan_declaration_flag

					}

					add_country_leader_trait = generallissimo

				}

				if = {

					limit = {

						has_cosmetic_tag = CHI_power_struggle_defeated

					}

					drop_cosmetic_tag = yes

					else = {

						if = {

							limit = {

								is_puppet = no

								has_country_flag = cooperation_with_communist_flag

							}

							set_cosmetic_tag = CHI_warlord_PRC

						}

						else_if = {

							limit = {

								is_puppet = no

								NOT = {

									has_country_flag = CHI_opposition_flag

								}

							}

							set_cosmetic_tag = CHI_warlord_leader

						}

					}

				}

				clear_global_event_target = WTT_current_china_leader #former china not us

				save_global_event_target_as = WTT_current_china_leader

				if = {

					limit = {

						has_dlc = "Waking the Tiger"

					}

					add_dynamic_modifier = {

						modifier = china_government_legitimacy

					}

				}

			}

		}

	}



	#Accept

	option = {

		clr_global_flag = wtt_national_leadership_takeover_in_progress

		name = wtt_take_national_leadership.1.a

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 5

			modifier = {

				factor = 0

				has_stability > 0.7

				has_war = no

			}

		}



		every_country = {

			limit = { has_war_with = ROOT }

			FROM = { add_to_war = { targeted_alliance = ROOT enemy = PREV hostility_reason = asked_to_join } }

		}

		hidden_effect = {

			every_owned_state = {

				limit = {

					NOT = {

						is_fully_controlled_by = ROOT

					}

				}

				FROM = {

					set_state_owner = PREV

				}

			}

		}

		every_unit_leader = {

			limit = {		

				NOT = {	has_id = 5010 }			 

		    }

			set_nationality = FROM

		}

		FROM = {

			country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.4443 }

			

			hidden_effect = {

				news_event = { id = AWR_CHI_news.883 days = 3 }

			}



			annex_country = {

				target = ROOT transfer_troops = yes

			}

			WTT_political_struggle_recalculate_support = yes



		}

		custom_effect_tooltip = GAME_OVER_TT

	}



	#Refuse

	option = {



		name = wtt_take_national_leadership.1.b

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 10

			modifier = {

				factor = 0

				NOT = {

					has_stability > 0.7

				}

				has_war_with = JAP

				surrender_progress > 0.1

			}

		}



		hidden_effect = {

			if = {

				limit = {

					is_faction_leader = yes

					is_in_faction_with = FROM

				}

				every_country = {

					limit = { is_in_faction_with = ROOT }

					ROOT = { remove_from_faction = PREV }

				}

			}

			else_if = {

				limit = {

					is_in_faction_with = FROM

				}

				random_country = {

					limit = { is_in_faction_with = ROOT }

					remove_from_faction = ROOT

				}

			}



			#End political struggle

			every_country = {

				limit = { has_country_flag = wtt_political_struggle }

				WTT_political_struggle_pause_current_country = yes

			}

		}





		declare_war_on = { target = FROM type = annex_everything }

		start_civil_war = { #states_filter doesnt work!

		    ideology = communism

		    size = 0.2

		    ###only_own_territory = yes

		}

		random_other_country = {

			limit = {

				original_tag = ROOT

				has_war_with = ROOT

				has_government = communism

			}

			every_unit_leader = {

				set_nationality = FROM

			}

			FROM = {

				annex_country = {

					target = PREV

					transfer_troops = yes

				}

			}

		}

		hidden_effect = {

		    FROM = { 

			    every_unit_leader = {

			        limit = {

				        OR = {

					        has_id = 5010

						    has_id = 5011

						    has_id = 5012

						    has_id = 5013

						    has_id = 5014

							has_id = 5015

							has_id = 2031

					    }

				    }

			        set_nationality = ROOT

		        }

		    }

		    ROOT = {

			    if = { 

				    limit = {

					    NOT = {

							has_country_leader = {

	                            character = CHI_chiang_kai_shek

	                            ruling_only = yes

                            }

					    }

					}

				    kill_country_leader = yes

					#kill_country_leader = yes

			        CHI_chiang_kai_shek = {

			            set_nationality = ROOT

						promote_leader = yes

					}

			    }

			}

		}

		set_global_flag = wtt_war_over_national_leadership

		set_country_flag = wtt_refused_giving_leadership

		clr_global_flag = wtt_national_leadership_takeover_in_progress

		add_ideas = CHI_illegal_regime

		FROM = {

			create_faction = WRL_leader_generic_faction

			country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.4444 }

		}

	}

}

					}

					FROM = {

						add_manpower = -3000

					}

					add_manpower = 3000

				}				

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					OR = {

						check_variable = { this.num_battalions < 340 }

						AND = {

							ROOT = { NOT = { has_war_with = JAP } }

							check_variable = { this.num_battalions < 500 }

						}

					}	

					#has_defensive_war = no

					FROM = {

						has_equipment = {

							infantry_equipment > 49999

						}

					}	

				}

				#FROM = {

				#	transfer_units_fraction = {

				#		target = ROOT          # the recipient

				#		size = 0            # [0,1] Default value for the ratio below if they are not specified

				#		army_ratio = 0.05       # [0,1] Overrides size modifier for army

				#		keep_unit_leaders_trigger = { # Trigger for unit leaders to remain with the original country

			}

					ideology = communism size = 0.1

				}

			}

					}

				}

					set_nationality = NEA

				}

				NEA = {

					annex_country = {

						target = PREV

						transfer_troops = yes

					}

				}

			}			

			

			NEA = {

				every_unit_leader = {

					limit = {

						OR = {

							has_id = 5010

							has_id = 5011

						    has_id = 5012

						    has_id = 5013

						    has_id = 5014

							has_id = 5015

							has_id = 2031

						}

					}

					set_nationality = CHI

				}

			}

			    #guo kill_country_leader = yes

			    CHI_chiang_kai_shek = {

			        promote_leader = yes

				}

			}

			

			every_other_country = {

				limit = {

					is_literally_china = yes

					NOT = {

						is_in_faction_with = ROOT

					}

					NOT = {

						OR = {

							is_in_faction_with = JAP

							has_war_together_with = JAP

						}

					}

				}

				set_global_flag = KMT_pro_JAP_NW_alliance_formed_gl

				set_country_flag = KMT_pro_JAP_NW_alliance_formed

				#

			}

				country_event = {

					days = 2 id = AWR_CHI.2561

				}

			}

				leave_faction = yes

				declare_war_on = {

					target = CHI

					type = annex_everything

				}	

			}

		}

	}

                picture = "gfx/leaders/PRC/Portrait_PRC_Liu_Shaoqi.dds"

                expire = "1965.1.1"

                ideology = marxism

                traits = { popular_figurehead moderate_reformist

                }

                       }

            }

            }

            }			

		if = {

			limit = {

				has_global_flag = PRC_was_player_can_usurp_CHI

			}

			hidden_effect = {

				for_each_scope_loop = {

					array = Root.core_states

					add_core_of = event_target:WTT_communist_china

				}

				random_owned_controlled_state = {

					limit = {

						is_core_of = ROOT

					}

					event_target:WTT_communist_china = {

						transfer_state = PREV

					}

				}

			}

			

			root = {#guo

					every_character = {

					limit = {

						has_character_flag = former_communist_forces

					}

					set_nationality = event_target:WTT_communist_china

					}

					

					every_unit_leader = {

					limit = {

						has_unit_leader_flag = former_communist_forces

					}

					set_nationality = event_target:WTT_communist_china

					}

					

					every_army_leader = {

					limit = {

						has_unit_leader_flag = former_communist_forces

					}

					set_nationality = event_target:WTT_communist_china

					}

					

					event_target:WTT_communist_china = {

						create_country_leader = { #Safe because Sokolovsky doesn't exist ingame

							name="毛泽东"

							picture = "gfx/leaders/PRC/maozedong1949.jpg"

							ideology = maoism

							desc=prc_mao_zedong_desc

							traits = { cornered_fox tiancaidezhanluejia tiancaidesixiangjia youjizhandashi hero_of_the_peasantry_MAO red_sun_of_the_people }

						}

						promote_character = prc_mao_zedong

					}

			}

			

			event_target:WTT_communist_china = {

				change_tag_from = ROOT				

			}

			custom_effect_tooltip = CONGRATS_YOU_SUBVERT_CHINA_WITHOUT_CIVIL_WAR

		}

		event_target:WTT_communist_china = {

			if = {#guo

			limit = { country_exists = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader }

			annex_country = {

				target = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader transfer_troops = yes

			}

			}

			

			if = {

				limit = {

					NOT = { has_country_flag = PRC_Establish_state_or_independent_government }

				}

				set_cosmetic_tag = PRC_lianhezhengfu

			}

		}

		

		if = {#guo

		limit = { tag = event_target:WTT_communist_china has_global_flag = CPC_candidate_is_PRC_zhou_enlai }

			retire_country_leader = yes

			promote_character = PRC_zhou_enlai

			add_mao_advisor_trait = yes

		}

	}

		option = {

		name = rcmchina_elections.4.b

	    trigger = {		

	    tag = CHI

		}		

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 10

		}

		#country_event = AWR_CHI.2585

			hidden_effect = {		

            CHI = {		

             create_country_leader = {

                name = "刘少奇"

                desc = "POLITICS_DETIANQIUYI_DESC"

                picture = "gfx/leaders/PRC/Portrait_PRC_Liu_Shaoqi.dds"

                expire = "1965.1.1"

                ideology = marxism

                traits = { popular_figurehead moderate_reformist

                }

                       }

				set_party_name = { ideology = communism long_name = "中国共产党" name = "中国共产党" }						   

				set_politics = {

					ruling_party = communism

					elections_allowed = yes

				}

				set_popularities = {

					fascism = 0

					neutrality = 20

					democratic = 15

					communism = 45

					n_socialism = 20

				}

            }

            }			

		if = {

			limit = {

				has_global_flag = PRC_was_player_can_usurp_CHI

			}

			hidden_effect = {

				for_each_scope_loop = {

					array = Root.core_states

					add_core_of = CHI

				}

				random_owned_controlled_state = {

					limit = {

						is_core_of = PRC

					}

					event_target:WTT_communist_china = {

						transfer_state = CHI

					}

				}

			}

			

			PRC = {#guo

					every_character = {

					set_nationality = CHI

					}

					

					every_unit_leader = {

					set_nationality = CHI

					}

					

					every_army_leader = {

					set_nationality = CHI

					}

					

					event_target:WTT_communist_china = {

						create_country_leader = { #Safe because Sokolovsky doesn't exist ingame

							name="毛泽东"

							picture = "gfx/leaders/PRC/maozedong1949.jpg"

							ideology = maoism

							desc=prc_mao_zedong_desc

							traits = { cornered_fox tiancaidezhanluejia tiancaidesixiangjia youjizhandashi hero_of_the_peasantry_MAO red_sun_of_the_people }

						}

						promote_character = prc_mao_zedong

					}

			}

		}

		CHI = {

			if = {#guo

			limit = { country_exists = event_target:WTT_communist_china }

			annex_country = {

				target = event_target:WTT_communist_china transfer_troops = yes

			}

			}

                        add_ideas = xingxingzhihuo_keyiliaoyuan_7

                        add_ideas = PRC_Revanchism

			set_cosmetic_tag = PRC_lianhezhengfu

		}

		

	}

}

				change_tag_from = ROOT

		}

		retire_country_leader = yes

					trait = tiancaidezhanluejia

				}

					character = prc_mao_zedong

				}

				}

			}

		}

	}

country_event = { #[Original KMT leader] or Sun Fo?

	id = AWR_CHI.2600 #[Root.GetNeutralParty]提名大会

	title = rcmchina_nomination_convention.1.t

	desc = rcmchina_nomination_convention.1.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_sun_fo

	is_triggered_only = yes



	option = {

		name = rcmchina_nomination_convention.1.a

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 100

		}

		#custom_effect_tooltip = CKS_or_HYQ_becomes_candidate_tt

		if = {

			limit = {

				or = { has_country_flag = CKS_leads_KMT CKS_in_charge = yes }#guo

			}

			custom_effect_tooltip = CKS_becomes_candidate_tt

		}

		else_if = {

			limit = {

				or = { has_country_flag = CKS_leads_KMT and = { TAG = event_target:WTT_communist_china has_country_leader = { ruling_only = no character = CHI_he_yingqin } } }#guo

			}

			custom_effect_tooltip = HYQ_becomes_candidate_tt

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				has_global_flag = cdl_founded

			}

			country_event = AWR_CHI.2602

			else = {

				country_event = AWR_CHI.2601

			}

		}

	}

	option = {

		name = rcmchina_nomination_convention.1.b

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 100

		}

		custom_effect_tooltip = sun_fo_becomes_candidate_tt

		set_country_flag = KMT_candidate_is_sun_fo

		if = {

			limit = {

				has_global_flag = cdl_founded

			}

			country_event = AWR_CHI.2602

			else = {

				country_event = AWR_CHI.2601

			}

		}

	}

}

			limit = {

				or = { has_country_flag = CKS_leads_KMT and = { TAG = event_target:WTT_communist_china has_country_leader = { ruling_only = no character = CHI_he_yingqin } } }#guo

			}

			custom_effect_tooltip = HYQ_becomes_candidate_tt

		}

		#########################

		if = {

			limit = {

				has_global_flag = cdl_founded

			}

		}

	}

			factor = 100

		}

		custom_effect_tooltip = sun_fo_becomes_candidate_tt

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.2686 #两广事变

	title = prc.1.t

	desc = {

		text = prc.1.d_com

		trigger = { TAG = PRC }

	}

	desc = {

		text = prc.1.d_clique

		trigger = { NOT = { TAG = PRC } }

	}

	picture = GFX_report_event_chinese_soldiers_02

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = { #join

		name = prc.1.a

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 30

			modifier = {

				factor = 200

				NOT = { #these warlords don't wanna join

					OR = {

						tag = XSM

						tag = NXM

						tag = GSM

						tag = EGM

						tag = HMI

						tag = TNG

						tag = SIK

						tag = XIK

						tag = SHX

						tag = SUY

						tag = YUN

						tag = HPC

					    tag = KHR

						tag = KRS

						tag = ATM

					}

				}

			}

			modifier = {

				factor = 200

				tag = GUD

				OR = { #GUD with GXC or historical, don't let them miss the war!

					AND = {

						has_global_flag = gud_ready

						GXC = { has_offensive_war_with = CHI }

					}

					is_historical_focus_on = yes

				}

			}

			modifier = {

				factor = 0

				OR = {

					# don't let(factor) these join(option)

					tag = XSM

					tag = NXM

					tag = GSM

					tag = EGM

					tag = HMI

					tag = TNG

					tag = SIK

					tag = XIK

					tag = SHX

					tag = SUY

					tag = YUN

					tag = HPC

				    tag = KHR

					tag = KRS

					tag = ATM

				}

			}

			modifier = {

				factor = 0

				tag = GUD

				NOT = {

					OR = { #GUD wont join if they aren't ready

						AND = {

							has_global_flag = gud_ready

							GXC = { has_offensive_war_with = CHI }

						}

						is_historical_focus_on = yes

					}

				}

			}

		}

		hidden_effect = {

			set_country_flag = joined_2g_war

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				is_subject = yes

			}

			random_other_country = {

				limit = {

					ROOT = {

						is_subject_of = PREV

					}

				}

				end_puppet = ROOT

			}

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				has_war_with = event_target:WTT_communist_china

				any_owned_state = {

					has_state_flag = I_choose_this_state_to_DMZ

				}

			}

			every_owned_state = {

				clr_state_flag = I_choose_this_state_to_DMZ

				set_demilitarized_zone = no

			}

			white_peace = event_target:WTT_communist_china

			hidden_effect = {

				event_target:WTT_communist_china = {

					white_peace = ROOT

				}

			}

		}

		GXC = { country_event = { days = 5 id = AWR_GXC.137 } }

		GUD = { country_event = { days = 5 id = AWR_GXC.137 } }

		CHI = { country_event = { days = 5 id = AWR_GXC.137 } }

	}

	option = { #not join

		name = prc.1.b

		set_country_flag = not_join_civil_war_flag

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 15

			modifier = { #these warlords won't join no matter what

				factor = 200

				OR = {

					#they don't want join

					tag = XSM

					tag = NXM

					tag = GSM

					tag = EGM

					tag = HMI

					tag = TNG

					tag = SIK

					tag = XIK

					tag = YUN

					tag = HPC

				    tag = KHR

					tag = KRS

					tag = ATM

				}

			}

			modifier = {

				factor = 0

				NOT = { #Not these warlords, let them not join

					OR = {

						tag = XSM

						tag = NXM

						tag = GSM

						tag = EGM

						tag = HMI

						tag = TNG

						tag = SIK

						tag = XIK

						tag = SHX

						tag = SUY

						tag = YUN

						tag = HPC

					    tag = KHR

						tag = KRS

						tag = ATM

					}

				}

			}

			modifier = {

				factor = 0

				tag = GUD

				OR = { #GUD with GXC or historical, don't let them miss the war!

					AND = {

						has_global_flag = gud_ready

						GXC = { has_offensive_war_with = CHI }

					}

					is_historical_focus_on = yes

				}

			}

		}

	}

}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.2689 #中国民主同盟取代国民党

	title = prc.4.t

	desc = prc.4.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_chinese_soldiers_02

	is_triggered_only = yes

	fire_only_once = yes

	option = { ##CDL in power

		name = prc.2.a

		effect_tooltip = {

			if = {

				limit = { has_war_with = SOV }

			white_peace = SOV

			}

			white_peace = event_target:WTT_communist_china

		}

		if = {

			limit = { country_exists = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader }

			diplomatic_relation = { country = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader relation = non_aggression_pact }

		}



		hidden_effect = {

			event_target:WTT_current_china_leader = {

				white_peace = SOV

				white_peace = event_target:WTT_communist_china

				white_peace = MON

				white_peace = TAN

				white_peace = SIK

			}

			every_country = {

				limit = {

					is_in_faction_with = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader

					capital_scope = { is_on_continent = asia }

					NOT = { tag = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader }

				}

				if = {

					limit = { event_target:WTT_current_china_leader = { is_faction_leader = yes } }

					white_peace = SOV

					white_peace = event_target:WTT_communist_china

					white_peace = MON

					white_peace = TAN

					white_peace = SIK

					else = {

						every_country = {

							limit = {

								is_faction_leader = yes

								is_in_faction_with = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader

							}

							set_country_flag = peace_sov_@ROOT

							remove_from_faction = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader

						}

					}

				}



			}

			every_country = {

				limit = {

					is_in_faction_with = SOV

					NOT = { tag = SOV }

				}

				white_peace = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader

			}

			every_country = {

				limit = {

				   has_country_flag = peace_sov_@ROOT

				}

				add_to_faction = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader

			}

		}

	}

}

			effect_tooltip = {

				event_target:WTT_communist_china = {

					transfer_state = PREV

				}

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					NOT = { state = 745 } #dalian

					OR = {

						is_controlled_by = SOV

						AND = {

							is_controlled_by = MON

							MON = {

								is_in_faction_with = SOV

								#has_war_together_with = SOV

							}

						}

					}

				}

				if = {

					limit = {

						is_core_of = event_target:WTT_communist_china

					    NOT = { has_state_flag = we_will_help_the_legit_government }

					}

					event_target:WTT_communist_china = {

						transfer_state = PREV

					}

					else = {

						event_target:WTT_current_china_leader = {

							transfer_state = PREV

						}

					}

				}

			}

		}

		hidden_effect = {

			for_each_scope_loop = {

				array = SOV.core_states

				if = {

					limit = {

						is_controlled_by = event_target:WTT_communist_china

					}

					SOV = {

						transfer_state = PREV

					}

				}

			}

		}

	}

	option = { #OH NO!

		name = prc.10.b

		trigger = {

			NOT = {

				TAG = event_target:WTT_communist_china

			}

		}

	}

}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.2752 #国民党军撤出肤施

	title = RCM_comchina.44.t

	desc = RCM_comchina.44.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_china_infiltration

	is_triggered_only = yes

	#fire_only_once = yes

	trigger = {

		always = no

	}

	immediate = {

		set_country_flag = RCM_comchina.44_flag

		hidden_effect = {

			622 = {

				set_variable = {

					ROOT.622_industrial_complex_level = This.industrial_complex_level

				}

				set_variable = {

					ROOT.622_arms_factory_level = This.arms_factory_level

				}

			}

			set_variable = {

				ROOT.622_combined_level = ROOT.622_industrial_complex_level

			}

			add_to_variable = {

				ROOT.622_combined_level = ROOT.622_arms_factory_level

			}

		}	

	}

	option = {

		name = RCM_comchina.44.a

		#move to yenan

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 100

		}

		custom_effect_tooltip = THIS_IS_HISTORICAL_TT

        add_stability = 0.03

		add_war_support = 0.03

		1030 = {

			transfer_state_to = ROOT

			set_victory_points = {

				province = 13405

				value = 10

			}

			add_building_construction = {

				type = bunker

				level = 5

				province = 13405

				instant_build = yes

			}	

		}

		set_capital = { state = 1030 }

		custom_effect_tooltip = move_622_factories_to_938_tt

		622 = {

			set_victory_points = {

				province = 13402

				value = 3

			}

			hidden_effect = {

				remove_building = {

					type = arms_factory

					level = This.arms_factory_level

				}

				remove_building = {

					type = industrial_complex

					level = This.industrial_complex_level

				}

			}

		}

		1030 = {

			hidden_effect = {

				add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = ROOT.622_combined_level

				add_building_construction = {

					type = industrial_complex

					level = ROOT.622_industrial_complex_level

					instant_build = yes

				}

				add_building_construction = {

					type = arms_factory

					level = ROOT.622_arms_factory_level

					instant_build = yes

				}

				#move_building_damage = yes

				clear_variable = ROOT.622_combined_level

			    clear_variable = ROOT.622_industrial_complex_level

			    clear_variable = ROOT.622_arms_factory_level

			}

		}

		clr_country_flag = RCM_comchina.44_flag

	}

	option = {

		name = RCM_comchina.44.b

		#move to yenan

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 0

		}

        1030 = {

			transfer_state_to = ROOT

		}

		clr_country_flag = RCM_comchina.44_flag

	}

}

		set_temp_variable = { temp_seats = -0.045 tooltip = TROT_faction_support_tt }

										#percentage

	}

		}

		add_political_power = 70

		add_war_support = -0.025

		set_temp_variable = { temp_member = 4 }

	id = AWR_CHI.2775 #毛泽东被任命为中央政治局主席

	title = RCM_comchina_mao.12.t

	desc = RCM_comchina_mao.12.d

	picture = GFX_MAO_zhongyang

	is_triggered_only = yes

	#fire_only_once = yes

	immediate = {

		

	}

	option = {

		name = RCM_comchina_mao.12.a

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 1

		}

		

		custom_effect_tooltip = zhengzhiju_gui_will_change

		custom_effect_tooltip = mao_renmingweizhuxi_tt		

		set_global_flag = mao_becomes_chairman

		set_country_flag = mao_becomes_chairman		

		add_trait = {

			character = PRC_liu_shaoqi

			slot = political_advisor

			trait = maoists_trait_liushaoqi

		}

		set_global_flag = PRC_liu_shaoqi_maoists_trait_liushaoqi

		PRC_liu_shaoqi = { promote_leader = yes }

		

		add_trait = {

			character = prc_ren_bishi

			slot = theorist

			trait = maoists_trait_renbishi

		}

		set_global_flag = prc_ren_bishi_maoists_trait_renbishi

		prc_ren_bishi = { promote_leader = yes }

		

		#to do add unlock mission to do rescue

		set_temp_variable = { temp_member = 2 }

		set_temp_variable = { temp_seats = 0.05 tooltip = MAOIST_faction_support_tt }

										#percentage

		modify_parliament_seat = yes

		add_political_power = 100

		hidden_effect = {

		if = {

		limit = {

		not = { has_country_leader = { ruling_only = yes character = prc_mao_zedong } }

        tag = PRC		

		}

		retire_country_leader = yes

		promote_character = prc_mao_zedong #guo

		}			

		if = {

			limit = {

			always = no

				has_country_leader_with_trait = cornered_fox

				always = no

			}

			prc_mao_zedong = {

		        add_country_leader_role = {

			        country_leader = {

				        expire = "1965.1.1"

				        ideology = maoism

						desc=prc_mao_zedong_desc

				        traits = {

				        }

			        }

			        promote_leader = yes

			    }   

		    } 

			add_country_leader_trait = {

				ideology = maoism

				trait = cornered_fox

			}

			#create_country_leader = {

			#	name = "Mao Zedong"

			#	desc = "POLITICS_MAO_ZEDONG_DESC"

			#	picture = "Portrait_PRC_Mao_Zedong.dds"

			#	expire = "1965.1.1"

			#	ideology = maoism

			#	traits = {

			#		cornered_fox

			#	}

			#}

		}		

		if = {

		limit = {

        tag = PRC		

		}		

		    prc_mao_zedong = {

					set_portraits = {

						army={

							large="gfx/leaders/PRC/DONG/Mao_Zedong_1943_v3.dds"

						}

					}

			}

			set_country_leader_portrait = {

		    portrait = "gfx/leaders/PRC/DONG/Mao_Zedong_1943_v3.dds"

		    }

		}

	    if = {

		limit = { 

		NOT = {		

        has_global_flag = mao_renmindajiuxing	

	    }				

		}				

		prc_mao_zedong = {

        remove_country_leader_trait = hero_of_the_peasantry_MAO		

	    }		

		prc_mao_zedong = {

        remove_country_leader_trait = { 

        ideology = marxism

        trait = hero_of_the_peasantry_MAO		

	    }		

	    }

		prc_mao_zedong = {

        remove_country_leader_trait = { 

        ideology = maoism

        trait = hero_of_the_peasantry_MAO		

	    }		

	    }

		}		

		}		

	}

			}

			country_event = {

				id = AWR_CHI.2807

				days = 2

			}

		}

		custom_effect_tooltip = enable_power_struggle

		hidden_effect = {

			WTT_setup_political_struggle = yes

			WTT_add_ROOT_to_political_struggle = yes

		}

		every_controlled_state = {

			limit = {

				is_core_of = ROOT

				WTT_is_potential_political_struggle_state = yes

			}

			#Add random state support for ROOT

			WTT_random_support_chance_increase_for_ROOT_in_state = yes

			hidden_effect = {

				#Save relevant event targets. Need to be done before updating state support

				save_event_target_as = state

				random_country = {

					limit = {

						PREV = { has_state_flag = majority_political_platform_@PREV }

					}

					save_event_target_as = majority_country

				}

				#Update state support

				WTT_recalculate_state_support_for_ROOT = yes

				#Status events

				WTT_fire_add_support_status_events = yes

				#Recalc all support

				WTT_political_struggle_recalculate_support = yes

			}

		}

	}

}

				#Update state support

				WTT_recalculate_state_support_for_ROOT = yes

				#Status events

				WTT_fire_add_support_status_events = yes

				#Recalc all support

				WTT_political_struggle_recalculate_support = yes

			}

		}

		PRC ={

			country_event = {

				id = AWR_CHI.2810

				days = 2

			}

		}

	}

	option = { #nah

		name = RCM_comchina_zhang.12.b

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 1

		}

		set_country_flag = warlord_supports_PRC

		WTT_political_struggle_recalculate_support = yes		

		PRC ={

			country_event = {

				id = AWR_CHI.2811

				days = 2

			}

		}

	}

}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.2818 #陈独秀问题

	title = RCM_comchina_trot.4.t

	desc = RCM_comchina_trot.4.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_chen_duxiu



	# triggered by PRC_question_of_chen_duxiu_focus



	is_triggered_only = yes

	#fire_only_once = yes



	immediate = {

		hidden_effect = {

			#clear_variable = accept_chance

			#clear_variable = reject_chance

			#clear_variable = pp_cost

			set_variable = { accept_chance = 0 }

			add_to_variable = { accept_chance = parliament_seat_array_adjusted^3 }

			set_variable = { reject_chance = 100 }

			subtract_from_variable = { reject_chance = parliament_seat_array_adjusted^3 }

			multiply_variable = { reject_chance = 0.5 }



			

			set_variable = { pp_cost = 0 }

			add_to_variable = { pp_cost = reject_chance }

			multiply_variable = { pp_cost = -5 }

		}

	}



	option = {

		name = RCM_comchina_trot.4.a

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 1

		}

		custom_effect_tooltip = THIS_IS_HISTORICAL_TT

		hidden_effect = {

			clear_variable = accept_chance

			clear_variable = reject_chance

			clear_variable = pp_cost

		}

	}

	option = {

		name = RCM_comchina_trot.4.b

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 0

		}

		

		custom_effect_tooltip = CHEN_WILL_ONLY_ACCEPT_WHEN_TROT_IS_HIGH_ENOUGH_TT

		add_political_power = -25

		random_list = {

			accept_chance = {

				country_event = AWR_CHI.2822

			}

			reject_chance = {

				country_event = AWR_CHI.2823

			}

		}

		hidden_effect = {

			

			clear_variable = accept_chance

			clear_variable = reject_chance

			clear_variable = pp_cost

		}

	}

	option = {

		name = RCM_comchina_trot.4.c

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 0

		}

		custom_effect_tooltip = CHEN_ACCEPT_BUT_COST_PP_AS_TROT_POPULARITY_TT

		add_political_power = pp_cost

		hidden_effect = {

			clear_variable = accept_chance

			clear_variable = reject_chance

			clear_variable = pp_cost

		}

		country_event = AWR_CHI.2822

	}

}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.2825 #党内危机：少数派统治

	title = RCM_comchina_decisions.2.t

	desc = RCM_comchina_decisions.2.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_communist_conference

	is_triggered_only = yes

	immediate = {

		set_global_flag = minority_rule_ongoing

	}

	#fire_only_once = yes

	trigger = {

		NOT = {

            has_completed_focus = PRC_7th_National_Congress_focus			

		}

	}	

	option = {

		name = RCM_comchina_decisions.2.a

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 2

		}

		clr_global_flag = minority_rule_ongoing

		if = {

			limit = {

				has_stability < 0.15

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					AND = {

						OR = {

							check_variable = { parliament_seat_array^0 < parliament_seat_array^1 }

							check_variable = { parliament_seat_array^0 < parliament_seat_array^2 }

							check_variable = { parliament_seat_array^0 < parliament_seat_array^3 }

						}

						leader_is_zhang_guotao = yes

					}

				}

				country_event = AWR_CHI.2826

			}

			else_if = {

				limit = {

					 AND = {

						OR = {

							check_variable = { parliament_seat_array^1 < parliament_seat_array^0 }

							check_variable = { parliament_seat_array^1 < parliament_seat_array^2 }

							check_variable = { parliament_seat_array^1 < parliament_seat_array^3 }

						}

						leader_is_maoist = yes

					}

				}

				country_event = AWR_CHI.2827

			}

			else_if = {

				limit = {

					AND = {

						OR = {

							check_variable = { parliament_seat_array^2 < parliament_seat_array^0 }

							check_variable = { parliament_seat_array^2 < parliament_seat_array^1 }

							check_variable = { parliament_seat_array^2 < parliament_seat_array^3 }

						}

						leader_is_28b = yes

					}    

				}

				country_event = AWR_CHI.2828

			}

			else_if = {

				limit = {

					AND = {

						OR = {

							check_variable = { parliament_seat_array^3 < parliament_seat_array^0 }

							check_variable = { parliament_seat_array^3 < parliament_seat_array^1 }

							check_variable = { parliament_seat_array^3 < parliament_seat_array^2 }

						}

						leader_is_trotskyist = yes

					}

				}

				country_event = AWR_CHI.2829

			}

		}

		else = {

			activate_mission = RCM_minority_rule_mission

			add_stability = -0.035

		}

	}

}

					controller = {

						has_war_together_with = JAP

					}

					controller = {

						is_in_faction_with = JAP

					}

				}

			}

		}

		1034 = { is_owned_by = CHI }

		JAP = { has_war_with = CHI }

		#CHI = {

		#	NOT = {

		#		has_idea = CHI_Transfer_capital

		#	}

		#}

		NOT = { has_global_flag = fall_of_wuhan_jap }

	}

	

	immediate = {

		set_global_flag = fall_of_wuhan_jap	

		hidden_effect = {

	    play_song = "武汉会战"			

		}		

	}

		days = 2

	}

		name = efm_news.1019.a

		trigger = { 

			NOT = {

				tag = CHI

				tag = JAP

			}

		}

		#JAP = { add_ideas = jap_stalemate }

	}

	option = {

		name = efm_news.1019.b

		trigger = { tag = CHI }	

		if = {

		limit = { is_ai = yes }

		

		add_equipment_to_stockpile = {

						type = infantry_equipment

						amount = 35000

						producer = CHI

					}

					add_equipment_to_stockpile = {

						type = anti_air_equipment

						amount = 200

						producer = CHI

					}

					add_equipment_to_stockpile = {

						type = anti_tank_equipment

						amount = 200

						producer = CHI

					}

					add_equipment_to_stockpile = {

						type = artillery_equipment

						amount = 500

						producer = CHI

					}

					add_equipment_to_stockpile = {#always biggest gap

						type = support_equipment

						amount = 1000 #not a typo

						producer = CHI

					}

					add_equipment_to_stockpile = {

						type = motorized_equipment

						amount = 300

						producer = CHI

					}

		}

		hidden_effect = {

		if = {

		limit = { 1035 = { is_controlled_by = CHI } }		

		CHI = {		

			country_event = AWR_CHI.1043

		}		

		}

		}		

	}

	option = {

		name = efm_news.1019.c

		trigger = { tag = JAP }

		#JAP = { add_ideas = jap_stalemate }

	}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.3176 #边境冲突：苏联胜利

	title = rcmjapan.3.t

	desc = rcmjapan.3.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_soviet_soldiers_tank



	is_triggered_only = yes



	option = {

		if = {

			limit = {

			761 = {

				is_owned_by = JAP

				any_neighbor_state = { is_owned_by = SOV } }

			}

			761 = { add_manpower = -30000 }

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				NOT = {

					761 = {

						is_owned_by = JAP

						any_neighbor_state = { is_owned_by = SOV }

					}

				}

			}

			random_owned_state = {

				limit = { any_neighbor_state = { is_owned_by = SOV } }

				add_manpower = -30000

			}

		}



		army_experience = 5

		add_tech_bonus = {

			name = rcmjapan.3.t #test_the_ussr_focus

			bonus = 0.5

			uses = 1

			category = cat_anti_tank

		}

		name = rcmjapan.3.a

		SOV = {

			country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.3177 }

		}

	}

}

country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.3177 }

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.3194

	hidden = yes

	trigger = {

		has_completed_focus = JAP_intervene_in_china

		is_subject_of = JAP

		OR = {

			tag = HPC

			tag = EHB

			tag = RFM

		}

		has_country_flag = im_rrc_now

		CHI = { is_puppet_of = JAP }

	}

	mean_time_to_happen = {

		days = 2

	}

	immediate = {

		hidden_effect = {

			annex_country = { target = CHI transfer_troops = yes }

			annex_country = { target = RFM transfer_troops = yes }

			annex_country = { target = EHB transfer_troops = yes }

			if = {

				limit = {

					HPC = {

						is_subject_of = JAP

						has_country_flag = im_rrc_now

					}

				}

				annex_country = { target = HPC transfer_troops = yes }

			}

			set_political_party = { ideology = neutrality popularity = 55 }

			set_political_party = { ideology = fascism popularity = 45 }

			set_politics = { ruling_party = neutrality elections_allowed = no }

			RRC_core = yes

			JAP = { puppet = ROOT }

		}

	}

	option = {}

}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.3197

	hidden = yes

	trigger = {

		exists = yes

		has_country_flag = im_jnc_now

		has_global_flag = jnc_exists

		OR = {

			RFM = { has_full_control_of_state = 597 }

			RFM = { has_full_control_of_state = 1079 }

			RFM = { has_full_control_of_state = 1077 }

			RFM = { has_full_control_of_state = 1028 }

			RFM = { has_full_control_of_state = 743 }

			RFM = { has_full_control_of_state = 614 }

		}

	}

	mean_time_to_happen = {

		days = 2

	}

	immediate = {

		hidden_effect = {

			if = {

				limit = {

					RFM = { has_full_control_of_state = 597 }

				}

				set_state_controller = 597

			    set_state_owner = 597 ###

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					RFM = { has_full_control_of_state = 1079 }

				}

				set_state_controller = 1079

			    set_state_owner = 1079 ###

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					RFM = { has_full_control_of_state = 1077 }

				}

				set_state_controller = 1077

			    set_state_owner = 1077 ###

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					RFM = { has_full_control_of_state = 1028 }

				}

				set_state_controller = 1028

			    set_state_owner = 1028 ###

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					RFM = { has_full_control_of_state = 743 }

				}

				set_state_controller = 743

			    set_state_owner = 743 ###

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					RFM = { has_full_control_of_state = 614 }

				}

				set_state_controller = 614

			    set_state_owner = 614 ###

			}

		}

	}

	option = {}

}

			AND = {

				tag = EHB

			}

			AND = {

				has_country_flag = im_rrc_now

				tag = EHB

			}

			}

			}

			AND = {

				has_country_flag = im_rrc_now

			}

				has_country_flag = im_rrc_now

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.3214

	hidden = yes

	trigger = {

		exists = yes

		OR = {

			JAP = {

				has_completed_focus = JAP_intervene_in_china

			}

			date > 1939.1.1

		}

		OR = {

			AND = {#tag = EHB

				tag = EHB

				has_global_flag = jnc_exists

			}

			AND = {#tag = hpc

				tag = HPC

				is_subject_of = JAP

			}

			tag = RFM

			tag = ECA

		}

		is_puppet_of = JAP

		NOT = { has_country_flag = transfer_state_loop }

		num_of_controlled_states > 1

		any_other_country = {

			has_war_with = ROOT

			has_war_with = JAP

			OR = {

				is_originally_warlord = yes

				is_legit_china = yes

			}

		}

	}

	mean_time_to_happen = {

		days = 2

	}

	immediate = {

		for_each_scope_loop = {

			array = ROOT.core_states

			if = {

				limit = {

					OR = {

						is_fully_controlled_by = ROOT

						is_fully_controlled_by = JAP

						controller = {

							is_subject_of = JAP

							has_full_control_of_state = PREV

						}

					}

					NOT = {

						is_owned_by = ECA

					}

					is_core_of = ROOT

				}

				ROOT = { set_state_controller = PREV }

			}

		}

		country_event = { hours = 8 id = AWR_CHI.3216 }

	}

	option = {

		set_country_flag = transfer_state_loop

	}

}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.3225 #扩大我们的傀儡政权？

	title = rcmjapan.34.t

	desc = rcmjapan.34.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_chinese_japanese_handshake

	trigger = {

		tag = JAP

		NOT = { country_exists = CHI }

		NOT = {

			any_enemy_country = {

				exists = yes

				OR = {

					is_warlord = yes

					TAG = PRC

				}

			}

		}

		OR = {

			AND = {

				EHB = { has_country_flag = im_rrc_now }

				country_exists = EHB

				EHB = { is_neighbor_of = JAP }

			}

			AND = {

				HPC = { is_subject_of = JAP }

				HPC = { has_country_flag = im_rrc_now }

				country_exists = HPC

				HPC = { is_neighbor_of = JAP }

			}

			AND = {

				RFM = { has_country_flag = im_rrc_now }

				country_exists = RFM

				RFM = { is_neighbor_of = JAP }

			}

			AND = {

				621 = {

				   is_owned_by = JAP

				   is_core_of = ECA

			    }

				746 = {

				   is_owned_by = JAP

				   is_core_of = ECA

			    }

				1019 = {

					is_owned_by = JAP

					is_core_of = ECA

				}

				1020 = {

					is_owned_by = JAP

					is_core_of = ECA

				}

			}

		}

		any_owned_state = {

			OR = {

				is_core_of = EHB

				is_core_of = RFM

				is_core_of = ECA

				is_claimed_by = EHB

				is_claimed_by = RFM

				is_claimed_by = ECA

				AND = {

					is_core_of = HPC

					HPC = {

						is_subject_of = ROOT

					}

				}

				AND = {

					is_claimed_by = HPC

					HPC = {

						is_subject_of = ROOT

					}

				}

			}

		}		

		NOT = { has_global_flag = RRC_expand }

		AND = {

			NOT = {

				any_other_country = {

					OR = {

						is_warlord = yes

						TAG = PRC

					}

					OR = {

						JAP = {

							has_wargoal_against = PREV

						}

						JAP = {

							has_war_with = PREV

						}

					}

				}

			}

		}

	}

	immediate = {

		set_global_flag = RRC_expand

	}

	mean_time_to_happen = {

		days = 2

	}

	option = {

		name = rcmjapan.34.a

		ai_chance = { factor = 100 }

		add_stability = 0.1

		if = {

			limit = {

				NOT = {

					any_of_scopes = {

						array = JAP.subjects

						is_rrc = yes

					}

				}

			}

			every_owned_state = {

				limit = {

					is_controlled_by = JAP

					OR = {

						is_core_of = EHB

						is_claimed_by = EHB

					}

					NOT = {

						HPC = {

							is_subject_of = JAP

						}

					}

				}

				EHB = { transfer_state = PREV }

			}

			every_owned_state = {

				limit = {

					is_controlled_by = JAP

					HPC = {

						is_subject_of = JAP

					}

					EHB = {

						NOT = {

							has_country_flag = im_jnc_now

						}

					}

					OR = {

						is_core_of = HPC

						is_claimed_by = HPC

					}

				}

				HPC = { transfer_state = PREV }

			}

			every_owned_state = {

				limit = {

					is_controlled_by = JAP

					OR = {

						is_core_of = RFM

						is_claimed_by = RFM

					}

				}

				RFM = { transfer_state = PREV }

			}

		}

		else_if = {

			limit = {

				EHB = { has_country_flag = im_rrc_now }

			}

			every_owned_state = {

				limit = {

					is_controlled_by = JAP

					OR = {

						is_core_of = EHB

						is_claimed_by = EHB

					}

				}

				EHB = { transfer_state = PREV }

			}

		}

		else_if = {

			limit = {

				HPC = { has_country_flag = im_rrc_now }

			}

			every_owned_state = {

				limit = {

					is_controlled_by = JAP

					OR = {

						is_core_of = HPC

						is_claimed_by = HPC

					}

				}

				HPC = { transfer_state = PREV }

			}

			else = {

				every_owned_state = {

					limit = {

						is_controlled_by = JAP

						OR = {

							is_core_of = RFM

							is_claimed_by = RFM

						}

					}

					RFM = { transfer_state = PREV }

				}

			}

		}

		every_owned_state = {

			limit = {

				is_controlled_by = JAP

				OR = {

					is_core_of = ECA

					is_claimed_by = ECA

				}

			}

			ECA = { transfer_state = PREV }

		}

		country_event = { hours = 3 id = AWR_CHI.3230 }

		#ECA = { country_event = { hours = 3 id = AWR_CHI.3353 } }

	}

	option = {

		name = rcmjapan.34.b

		ai_chance = { factor = 0 }

		add_stability = -0.1

		country_event = { hours = 3 id = AWR_CHI.3230 }

	}

	}

				}

			base = 50

			modifier = {

				add = -50

				has_game_rule = {

					rule = JAP_ai_behavior

					option = SONNO_TOKAN

				}

			}

		}

		custom_effect_tooltip = THIS_IS_HISTORICAL_TT

		custom_effect_tooltip = crack_down

		hidden_effect = {

			country_event = { days = 2 id = AWR_CHI.3245 }

			news_event = { days = 1 id = AWR_CHI_news.615 }

		}

	}

	option = {#reshuffle cabinet

		name = rcmjapan.39.b

		ai_chance = {

			base = 0

			modifier = {

				add = 50

				OR = {

					has_game_rule = {

						rule = JAP_ai_behavior

						option = SONNO_TOKAN

					}

					has_country_flag = JAP_AI_RANDOM_FASCIST

				}

			}

		}

		custom_effect_tooltip = reshuffle_cabinet

		hidden_effect = {

			country_event = { days = 3 id = AWR_CHI.3246 }

			set_country_flag = kodoha_won_event

			news_event = { days = 2 id = AWR_CHI_news.614 } #okada assassinated

					}

					}

					}

				}

			}

		}

			anti_communist

		}

		}

		remove_ideas = mineo_osumi

		}

				add = -50

					OR = {

						has_game_rule = {

							rule = JAP_ai_behavior

							option = OKADA_STAYS_TREATY_FACTION

						}

						has_game_rule = {

							rule = JAP_ai_behavior

							option = OKADA_STAYS_STATE_SOCIALISM

						}

						has_game_rule = {

							rule = JAP_ai_behavior

							option = OKADA_STAYS_COMMUNISM

						}

						has_game_rule = {

							rule = JAP_ai_behavior

							option = OKADA_STAYS_TOHOKAI

						}

					}

				}

				is_historical_focus_on = yes

			}

		}

		hidden_effect ={

			set_global_flag = kodoha_failed

			set_global_flag = okada_stays

		}

			add_idea = JAP_kodoha_plot_2

		}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.3257

	hidden = yes

	fire_only_once = yes

	trigger = {

		tag = JAP

		NOT = { has_completed_focus = showa_restoration_focus }

		focus_progress = {

			focus = showa_restoration_focus

			progress > 0.2

		}

	}

	immediate = {

		#if = {

		#	limit = {

		#		OR = {

		#			is_historical_focus_on = yes

		#			AND = {

		#				has_country_flag = genro_purged_by_kodoha

		#				has_country_flag = prince_purged_by_kodoha

		#			}

		#		}

		#	}

		#	set_country_flag = emperor_refuses

		#}

		if = {

			limit = {

				#NOT = { is_historical_focus_on = yes }

				OR = {

					has_country_flag = genro_purged_by_kodoha

					has_country_flag = prince_purged_by_kodoha

				}

				NOT = {

					AND = {

						has_country_flag = genro_purged_by_kodoha

						has_country_flag = prince_purged_by_kodoha

					}

				}

				NOT = {

					OR = {

						has_idea = saionji_kinmochi

						has_idea = kanin_kotohito

					}

				}

			}

			random_list = {

				75 = { set_country_flag = emperor_refuses }

				25 = { set_global_flag = nothing_here }

			}

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				#NOT = { is_historical_focus_on = yes }

				OR = {

					has_country_flag = genro_purged_by_kodoha

					has_country_flag = prince_purged_by_kodoha

				}

				NOT = {

					AND = {

						has_country_flag = genro_purged_by_kodoha

						has_country_flag = prince_purged_by_kodoha

					}

				}

				OR = {

					has_idea = saionji_kinmochi

					has_idea = kanin_kotohito

				}

			}

			random_list = {

				50 = { set_country_flag = emperor_refuses }

				50 = { set_global_flag = nothing_here }

			}

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				#NOT = { is_historical_focus_on = yes }

				NOT = {

					OR = {

						has_country_flag = genro_purged_by_kodoha

						has_country_flag = prince_purged_by_kodoha

					}

				}

				OR = {

					has_idea = saionji_kinmochi

					has_idea = kanin_kotohito

				}

				NOT = {

					AND = {

						has_idea = saionji_kinmochi

						has_idea = kanin_kotohito

					}

				}

			}

			random_list = {

				30 = { set_country_flag = emperor_refuses }

				70 = { set_global_flag = nothing_here }

			}

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				#NOT = { is_historical_focus_on = yes }

				NOT = {

					OR = {

						has_country_flag = genro_purged_by_kodoha

						has_country_flag = prince_purged_by_kodoha

					}

country_event = { #CHINA REUNITES

	id = AWR_CHI.3302 #中国重新统一

	title = rcmjapan.67.t

	desc = rcmjapan.67.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_japanese_chinese_surrender

	is_triggered_only = yes

	#immediate = { 

	#	set_global_flag = united_china

	#}

	option = {

		name = rcmjapan.67.a



		for_each_scope_loop = {

			array = global.big_china

			tooltip = big_china_tt

			if = {

				limit = {							

					state_should_be_transferred_to_china = yes

				}

				if = {

					limit = { JAP = { has_completed_focus = JAP_expand_the_revolutions_focus } }

					event_target:WTT_communist_china = { transfer_state = PREV }

				}

				if = {

					limit = { JAP = { NOT = {  has_completed_focus = JAP_expand_the_revolutions_focus } } }

					event_target:WTT_current_china_leader = { transfer_state = PREV }

				}

			}

		}

		hidden_effect = {

			country_event = { hours = 5 id = AWR_CHI.3305 }

		}

	}

}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.3340

	hidden = yes

	is_triggered_only = yes

	immediate = {

		hidden_effect = { #so china and SHX get to keep what they captured

			if = {

				limit = {

					PLM = {

						OR = {

							has_war_with = CHI

							has_war_with = SHX

						}						

					}

				}

				if = {

					limit = {

						NOT = {

							PLM = {

								controls_state = 1014

							}

						}

					}

					SHX = {

						transfer_state = 1014

						transfer_state = 621

						transfer_state = 746

					}

				}

				else_if = {

					limit = {

						NOT = {

							PLM = {

								AND = { 

									controls_state = 621

								    controls_state = 746 

							    }

							}

						}

					}

					SHX = {

						transfer_state = 621

						transfer_state = 746

					}

				}			

			}

		}

		PLM = {

			every_unit_leader = {

			    set_nationality = ROOT

			}

		}

		annex_country = {

			target = PLM

			transfer_troops = yes

		}

		MEN_CREATION = yes

	}

	option = {

	}

}

	id = AWR_CHI.3360 #重建[CCP.GetName]？

	title = rcmjapan.1007.t

	desc = rcmjapan.1007.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_great_way



	trigger = {

		tag = JAP

		is_subject = no

		613 = {

			is_controlled_by_jap_or_its_puppet = yes

			#is_owned_by = JAP

		}

		1078 = {

			is_controlled_by_jap_or_its_puppet = yes

			#is_owned_by = JAP

		}

		NOT = {

			country_exists = CCP

		}

		NOT = {

			country_exists = RFM

		}

		NOT = {

			any_of_scopes = {

				array = ROOT.subjects

				exists = yes

				is_rrc = yes

			}

		}

		NOT = {

			has_country_flag = no_rebuild_CCP

		}

		NOT = {

			OR = {

				has_global_flag = rrc_exists

				has_global_flag = rfm_exists

			}

		}

		has_global_flag = ccp_exists

	}

	mean_time_to_happen = {

		days = 2

	}

	option = {#YES

		name = rcmjapan.1007.a

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 100

		}

		CCP = {

			transfer_state = 613

			add_state_core = 613

			transfer_state = 1078

			add_state_core = 1078

		}

		puppet = CCP

		hidden_effect = {

			CCP = {

				set_politics = {

					ruling_party = fascism

					elections_allowed = no

				}

				set_political_party = {

					ideology = neutrality

					popularity = 30

				}

				set_political_party = {

					ideology = n_socialism

					popularity = 0

				}

				set_political_party = {

					ideology = communism

					popularity = 0

				}

				set_political_party = {

					ideology = fascism

					popularity = 70

				}

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					has_war_with = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader

				}

				CCP = {

					event_target:WTT_current_china_leader = {

						PREV = {

							add_to_war = {

								targeted_alliance = JAP

								enemy = PREV

							}

						}

					}

				}

			}

		}

	}

	#option = {#NO

	#	name = rcmjapan.1007.b

	#

	#}

	option = {#NO FOREVER

		name = rcmjapan.1007.b

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 0

		}

		set_country_flag = no_rebuild_CCP

	}

}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.3365 #重建[NSG.GetName]？

	title = rcmjapan.1012.t

	desc = rcmjapan.1012.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_NSG

	trigger = {

		is_subject = no

		tag = JAP

		1048 = {

			is_controlled_by_jap_or_its_puppet = yes

			#is_owned_by = JAP

		}

		NOT = {

			country_exists = NSG

		}

		NOT = {

			has_country_flag = no_rebuild_NSG

		}

		has_global_flag = nsg_exists

		NOT = {

			has_global_flag = mej_exists

		}

	}

	mean_time_to_happen = {

		days = 2

	}

	option = {#YES

		name = rcmjapan.1012.a

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 100

		}

		custom_effect_tooltip = NSG_establish_tt

		hidden_effect = {

			#set_global_flag = nsg_exists

			NSG = {

				transfer_state = 1013

				add_state_core = 1013

                delete_unit_template_and_units = { division_template = "Luchün Shih" } 				

                delete_unit_template_and_units = { division_template = "T'iaocheng Shih" } 

                delete_unit_template_and_units = { division_template = "Chengli Shih" } 

                delete_unit_template_and_units = { division_template = "Ch'iping Shih" } 

                delete_unit_template_and_units = { division_template = "Tuli Lü" }  

                delete_unit_template_and_units = { division_template = "Tuli Ch'iping Lü" }  				

			}

			JAP = {

				set_autonomy = {

					target = NSG

					autonomous_state = autonomy_wtt_imperial_protectorate

				}

			}

			NSG = {

				set_politics = { ruling_party = fascism elections_allowed = no }

				set_political_party = { ideology = neutrality popularity = 35 }

				set_political_party = { ideology = fascism popularity = 65 }

				set_political_party = { ideology = communism popularity = 0 }

				set_political_party = { ideology = democratic popularity = 0 }

				set_political_party = { ideology = n_socialism popularity = 0 }

			}



		}

	}

	#option = {#NO

	#	name = rcmjapan.1012.b

	#}

	option = {#NO FOREVER

		name = rcmjapan.1012.b

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 0

		}

		set_country_flag = no_rebuild_NSG

	}

}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.3367 #与[EYW_jap_chi.GetName]整合？

	title = rcmjapan.1020.t

	desc = rcmjapan.1020.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_new_reorganized_national_government

	

	is_triggered_only = yes

	

	option = { #Annexed by China

		name = rcmjapan.1020.a

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 100

		}

		event_target:EYW_jap_chi = {

			hidden_effect = { country_event = { hours = 5 id = AWR_CHI.3372 } }

			if = {

				limit = { is_ai = yes }

				change_tag_from = ROOT

				else = { custom_effect_tooltip = GAME_OVER_TT }

			}

		}

	}

	option = { # No

		name = rcmjapan.1020.b

		event_target:EYW_jap_chi = { puppet = ROOT }

	}

}

country_event = { hours = 5 id = AWR_CHI.3372 }

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.3369 #与[EYW_jap_chi.GetName]整合？

	title = rcmjapan.1021.t

	desc = rcmjapan.1021.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_new_reorganized_national_government

	

	is_triggered_only = yes

	

	option = { #Annexed by HPC

		name = rcmjapan.1021.a

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 100

		}

		HPC = {

			hidden_effect = { country_event = { hours = 5 id = AWR_CHI.3372 } }

			if = {

#				limit = { ROOT = { is_ai = no } }

				limit = { is_ai = yes } #whether ROOT is ai or not is irrelevant. Tag switch can only happen when the annexer is not player.

				change_tag_from = ROOT

				else = { custom_effect_tooltip = GAME_OVER_TT }

			}

		}

	}

	option = { # No

		name = rcmjapan.1021.b

		HPC = { puppet = ROOT }

	}

}

country_event = { hours = 5 id = AWR_CHI.3372 }

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.3371 #[EHB.GetName]的命运

	title = rcmjapan.1022.t

	desc = rcmjapan.1022.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_new_reorganized_national_government

	

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = { #Give EHB to HPC

		name = rcmjapan.1022.a

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 10

			modifier = {

				factor = 0

				is_ai = yes

				HPC = {

					is_ai = no

				}

			}

		}

		trigger =  {

			EHB = {

				is_puppet_of = ROOT

				OR = {

					is_ai = no

					CHI = {

						has_country_leader = { name = "None" ruling_only = yes }

					}

				}

			}

		}

		EHB = {	

			for_each_scope_loop = {

				array = global.small_china

				tooltip = small_china_tt

				add_core_of = PREV

			}

			for_each_scope_loop = {

				array = global.big_china

				tooltip = big_china_tt

				effect_tooltip = {

					add_claim_by = PREV

				}

				if = {

					limit = {

						NOT = { is_in_array = { global.small_china = This.id } }

					}

					add_claim_by = PREV

				}

			}

			save_global_event_target_as = EYW_jap_chi

			CHI = {

				get_current_government_type_global = yes

			}

			restore_previous_government_type_global = yes

			

			hidden_effect = {

				if = {

					limit = {

						CHI = { has_government = democratic }

					}

					set_cosmetic_tag = CPG

					set_party_name = {

						ideology = democratic

						name = CHI_n_socialism_cdl

						long_name = CHI_n_socialism_cdl_long

					}

				}

				if = {

					limit = {

						CHI = { has_government = n_socialism }

					}

					set_cosmetic_tag = CHI

					set_party_name = {

						ideology = n_socialism

						name = CHI_communism_party_POW

						long_name = CHI_communism_party_POW_long

					}

				}

				if = {

					limit = {

						CHI = { has_government = communism }

					}

					set_cosmetic_tag = CHI_warlord_leader_communism

					set_party_name = {

						ideology = communism

						name = PRG_party

						long_name = PRG_party_long

					}

				}

			}

		}		

		CHI = { country_event = AWR_CHI.3367 }

		HPC = { country_event = AWR_CHI.3367 }

	}

	option = { #Give EHB to HPC

		name = rcmjapan.1022.b

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 10

			modifier = {

				factor = 0

				is_ai = yes

				EHB = {

					is_ai = no

				}

			}

			modifier = {

				factor = 0

				is_ai = yes

				CHI = {

					has_country_leader = { name = "None" ruling_only = yes }

				}

			}

		}

		trigger =  {

			HPC = {

				is_puppet_of = ROOT

				OR = {

					is_ai = no

					CHI = {

						has_country_leader = { name = "None" ruling_only = yes }

					}

				}

			}

		}

		HPC = {

			for_each_scope_loop = {

				array = global.small_china

				tooltip = small_china_tt

				add_core_of = PREV

			}

			for_each_scope_loop = {

				array = global.big_china

				tooltip = big_china_tt

				effect_tooltip = {

					add_claim_by = PREV

				}

				if = {

					limit = {

						NOT = { is_in_array = { global.small_china = This.id } }

					}

					add_claim_by = PREV

				}

			}

			save_global_event_target_as = EYW_jap_chi

			CHI = {

				get_current_government_type_global = yes

			}

			restore_previous_government_type_global = yes

			

						

			hidden_effect = {

				if = {

					limit = {

						CHI = { has_government = democratic }

					}

					set_cosmetic_tag = CPG

					set_party_name = {

						ideology = democratic

						name = CHI_n_socialism_cdl

						long_name = CHI_n_socialism_cdl_long

					}

				}

				if = {

					limit = {

						CHI = { has_government = n_socialism }

					}

					set_cosmetic_tag = CHI

					set_party_name = {

						ideology = n_socialism

						name = CHI_communism_party_POW

						long_name = CHI_communism_party_POW_long

					}

				}

				if = {

					limit = {

						CHI = { has_government = communism }

					}

					set_cosmetic_tag = CHI_warlord_leader_communism

					set_party_name = {

						ideology = communism

						name = PRG_party

						long_name = PRG_party_long

					}

				}

			}

		}

		CHI = { country_event = AWR_CHI.3369 }

		EHB = { country_event = AWR_CHI.3369 }

	}

	option = { # Give EHB to China

		name = rcmjapan.1022.c

		trigger = { NOT = { CHI = { has_country_leader = { name = "None" ruling_only = yes } } } }

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 10

			modifier = {

				factor = 0

				HPC = { is_puppet_of = ROOT is_ai = no }

			}

			modifier = {

				factor = 0

				EHB = { is_puppet_of = ROOT is_ai = no }

			}

		}

		trigger =  { CHI = { is_puppet_of = ROOT } }

		CHI = {

			if = {

				limit = {

					OR = {

						has_government = communism

						has_government = n_socialism

					}	

				}

				load_focus_tree = warlord_generic_communist

			}

			else = {

				load_focus_tree = warlord_generic_nationalist

			}

		}

		HPC = { country_event = AWR_CHI.3367 }

		EHB = { country_event = AWR_CHI.3367 }

	}

}

		name = rcmjapan.90.a

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 100

		}

		trigger = {

			country_exists = NSG

			country_exists = SCG

		}

		SCG = {

			country_event = {

				hours = 1 id = AWR_CHI.3378

			}

		}

		NSG = {

			country_event = {

				hours = 5 id = AWR_CHI.3385

			}

		}

		create_mengjiang = yes

	}

	option = {#ONE EXIST

		name = rcmjapan.90.b

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 100

		}

		trigger = {

			OR = {

				country_exists = NSG

				country_exists = SCG

			}

			NOT = {

				AND = {

					country_exists = NSG

					country_exists = SCG

				}

			}

		}



		if = {

			limit = {

				country_exists = SCG

			}

			transfer_state = 1013

			create_mengjiang = yes

			SCG = {

				country_event = {

					hours = 1 id = AWR_CHI.3378

				}

			}

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				country_exists = NSG

			}

			transfer_state = 611

			create_mengjiang = yes

			NSG = {

				country_event = {

					hours = 5 id = AWR_CHI.3385

				}

			}

		}

	}

	option = {#NONE EXIST

		name = rcmjapan.90.c

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 100

		}

		trigger = {

			NOT = {

				OR = {

					country_exists = NSG

					country_exists = SCG

				}

			}

		}

		transfer_state = 1013

		transfer_state = 611

		create_mengjiang = yes

	}

}

	picture = GFX_report_mongol_gov

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {

		name = rcmjapan.97.a

		effect_tooltip = {

			annex_country = {

				target = FROM transfer_troops = yes

			}

		}

		hidden_effect = {

			JAP = {

				annex_country = {

				target = FROM transfer_troops = yes

				}

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					NOT = {

						owns_state = 1013

					}

				}

				transfer_state = 1013

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					NOT = {

						owns_state = 611

					}

				}

				transfer_state = 611

			}

		}

		set_capital = { state = 611 }

	}

}

			}

		}

			}

		}

		1013 = {

			is_controlled_by_jap_or_its_puppet = yes

		}

		}

			}

				}

			}

				set_politics = { ruling_party = fascism elections_allowed = no }

				set_political_party = { ideology = fascism popularity = 65 }

				set_political_party = { ideology = communism popularity = 0 }

				set_political_party = { ideology = democratic popularity = 0 }

				set_political_party = { ideology = n_socialism popularity = 0 }

				add_opinion_modifier = {

					target = GER

					modifier = GER_wuxuzaiyi

				}				

				add_ai_strategy = {

					type = alliance

					id = "GER"

					value = -100

				}				

			}

				add_opinion_modifier = {

					target = NSG

					modifier = GER_wuxuzaiyi

				}				

				add_ai_strategy = {

					type = alliance

					id = "NSG"

				}

			}

		}

	}

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 0

		}

		}

			}

				}

		}

				has_government = democratic

			}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.3406

	title = wtt_japan.1.t

	desc = wtt_japan.1.desc

	picture = GFX_report_event_japanese_transport_soldiers



	is_triggered_only = yes



	#Accept transfer puppet

	#Checking for puppet in decision that fires event.

	option = {

		name = wtt_japan.1.a

		ai_chance = {

			base = 10

		}

		every_other_country = {

			limit = {

				OR = {

					tag = MAL

					tag = SST

					tag = FIC

					tag = INS

					tag = BOR

					tag = SAR	

				}

				is_puppet_of = ROOT

			}

			set_country_flag = Pacific_gaurdian_flag

			if = {

				limit = {

					tag = FIC

				}

				release = CAM

				release = VIN

				release = LAO

				FROM = {

					puppet = CAM

					puppet = VIN

					puppet = LAO

				}

			}

			else = {

				FROM = {

					puppet = PREV

				}

			}

		}

		FROM = { country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.3409 days = 1 } }

	}



	#Refuse

	option = {

		name = wtt_japan.1.b

		ai_chance = {

			base = 0

		}

		FROM = { country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.3410 days = 1 } }

	}

}

			if = {

				limit = {

					JAP = {

						has_war_with = HOL

					}

				}

				white_peace = HOL

			}

			diplomatic_relation = {

			    country = HOL

			    relation = non_aggression_pact

			    active = yes

			}

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				NOT = {

					USA = {

						has_war_with = ENG

					}

				}

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					JAP = {

						has_war_with = ENG

					}

				}

				white_peace = ENG

			}

			diplomatic_relation = {

			    country = ENG

			    relation = non_aggression_pact

			    active = yes

			}

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				NOT = {

					USA = {

						has_war_with = SIA

					}

				}

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					JAP = {

						has_war_with = SIA

					}

				}

				white_peace = SIA

			}

			}

		}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.3461 #共产主义政变

	title = rcmjapan_expand_revo.40.t

	desc = rcmjapan_expand_revo.40.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_generic_riot

	trigger = {

		JAP = {

			has_government = communism

		}

		OR = {

			AND = {

				has_country_flag = JAP_subversion_flag

				is_puppet = no

				communism > 0.5

			}

			AND = {

				has_country_flag = JAP_subversion_flag

				is_puppet = yes

				communism > 0.75

			}

		}

	}

	mean_time_to_happen = {

		days = 2

	}

	option = {

		name = rcmjapan_expand_revo.40.a

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 40

		}

		trigger = {

			OR = {

				tag = SST 

				num_of_controlled_states < 1

			}

		}

		set_country_flag = submit_oof

		JAP = { country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.3464 days = 1 } }

	}

	option = {

		name = rcmjapan_expand_revo.40.b

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 60

		}

		trigger = {

			NOT = {

				tag = SST 

			}

			num_of_controlled_states > 1

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				is_puppet = yes

			}

			OVERLORD = {

				if = {

					limit = {

						NOT = {

							has_war_with = FROM

						}

					}

					set_country_flag = peace_on_war_ends_flag

					FROM = {

						set_country_flag = peace_on_war_ends_flag

					}

				}

			}

		}

		start_civil_war = {

			ideology = communism

			size = 0.5

		}

		JAP = { country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.3464 days = 1 } }

	}

}

	    ai_chance = {

		base = 0 

		modifier = {

		add = 9999

		has_war = yes

		}																				   

		}		

			set_party_name = {

				ideology = neutrality

				name = "皇族内阁"

				long_name = "皇族内阁"

			}		

			set_politics = {

				ruling_party = neutrality

				elections_allowed = no

			}

		create_country_leader = { 

			name="dong_jiu"

			desc = "dong_jiu_desc"

			picture = "gfx/leaders/JAP/dongjiuer.png"

			ideology = despotism

			traits = { representative_of_emperor against_democracy militaristic_background }			

		}			

	}

	option = {

		name = rcmjapan_defeated.233.b

	    ai_chance = {

		base = 0 

		modifier = {

		add = 9999

		has_war = no

		}																				   

		}		

		ai_chance = { factor = 0 }		

        add_political_power = -100

		add_stability = 0.1		

		add_war_support = -0.25		

	}	

}
