	is_triggered_only = yes



	option = {

		name = rcmjapan_leave_lnc.1.a

		ai_chance = {

			base = 100

			modifier = {

				add = -100

				OR = {

					has_game_rule = {

						rule = JAP_ai_behavior

						option = OKADA_STAYS_TREATY_FACTION

					}

					has_game_rule = {

						rule = JAP_ai_behavior

						option = OKADA_STAYS_STATE_SOCIALISM

					}

					has_game_rule = {

						rule = JAP_ai_behavior

						option = OKADA_STAYS_COMMUNISM

					}

					has_game_rule = {

						rule = JAP_ai_behavior

						option = OKADA_STAYS_TOHOKAI

					}

				}

			}

		}

		custom_effect_tooltip = THIS_IS_HISTORICAL_TT

		add_stability = 0.05

		#add_political_power = -50

		remove_naval_treaty_effect = yes

		every_other_country = {

			limit = {

				has_naval_treaty_trigger = yes

			}

			country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.3491 days = 2 }

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				has_global_flag = {

					flag = MTG_naval_treaty_signatories

					value < 3

				}

			}

			random_other_country = {

				limit = {

					has_naval_treaty_trigger = yes

				}

				remove_naval_treaty_effect = yes

			}

			clr_global_flag = MTG_naval_treaty_signatories

			hidden_effect = { news_event = mtg_news.60 }

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				has_global_flag = MTG_naval_treaty_signatories

			}

			modify_global_flag = {

				flag = MTG_naval_treaty_signatories

				value = -1

			}

		}

		

	}



	option = {

		name = rcmjapan_leave_lnc.1.b

		ai_chance = {

			base = 0

			modifier = {

				add = 100

				OR = {

					is_historical_focus_on = no

					has_game_rule = {

						rule = JAP_ai_behavior

						option = OKADA_STAYS_TREATY_FACTION

					}

					has_game_rule = {

						rule = JAP_ai_behavior

						option = OKADA_STAYS_STATE_SOCIALISM

					}

					has_game_rule = {

						rule = JAP_ai_behavior

						option = OKADA_STAYS_COMMUNISM

					}

					has_game_rule = {

						rule = JAP_ai_behavior

						option = OKADA_STAYS_TOHOKAI

					}

				}

			}

		}

		add_stability = -0.15

		add_political_power = 50

		set_country_flag = okada_stronk

		custom_effect_tooltip = unlock_japan_okada_stays_tt

	}

					}

						}

					}

				}

            }

			}

			if = {

						exists = yes

							is_puppet_of = PREV

						}

					}

				}

            FRA = {

            }

			}

			if = {

						exists = yes

							is_puppet_of = PREV

						}

					}

				}

				puppet = VIN

			}

		}

		else = {

			JAP = {

				every_owned_state = {

					limit = {

						is_core_of = FIC

					}

						transfer_state = PREV

					}

				}

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					FIC = {

						NOT = {

							is_puppet_of = PREV

						}

					}

				}

			}

		}

	}

					}

		}

		custom_effect_tooltip = allow_socialist_branch_tt

	}

}

	desc = rcmjapan_christian.1.d

			JAP = {

				scoped_sound_effect = long_choir

			}

		}

	}

	option = {

		name = rcmjapan_christian.1.a

		if = {

			limit = {

				has_idea = jap_church_1

			}

			swap_ideas = {

				remove_idea = jap_church_1

				add_idea = jap_church_2

			}

		}

		else_if = {

			limit = {

				has_idea = jap_church_2

			}

			swap_ideas = {

				remove_idea = jap_church_2

				add_idea = jap_church_3

			}

		}

		else_if = {

			limit = {

				has_idea = jap_church_3

			}

			swap_ideas = {

				remove_idea = jap_church_3

				add_idea = jap_church_4

			}

		}

		else_if = {

			limit = {

				has_idea = jap_church_4

			}

			swap_ideas = {

				remove_idea = jap_church_4

				add_idea = jap_church_5

			}

		}

		else_if = {

			limit = {

				has_idea = jap_church_5

			}

			swap_ideas = {

				remove_idea = jap_church_5

				add_idea = jap_church_6

			}

		}

	}

}

country_event = { 

	id = AWR_CHI.3522 #教会当局受到挑战

	title = rcmjapan_christian.2.t

	desc = rcmjapan_christian.2.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_asian_unrest_2

	#immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event AWR_CHI.3507"}

	#fire_only_once = yes

	trigger = {

		tag = JAP

		has_completed_focus = JAP_fund_the_unitarian_church_focus

		OR = {

			has_idea = jap_church_2

			has_idea = jap_church_3

			has_idea = jap_church_4

			has_idea = jap_church_5

			has_idea = jap_church_6

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				has_idea = jap_church_2

			}

			custom_trigger_tooltip = {

				tooltip = church_acceptance_greater_than_10 #it's actually smaller than, but this won't be seen

				check_variable = { ROOT.current_christian_acceptance < 10 }

			}				

		}

		else_if = {

			limit = {

				has_idea = jap_church_3

			}

			custom_trigger_tooltip = {

				tooltip = church_acceptance_greater_than_30 #it's actually smaller than, but this won't be seen

				check_variable = { ROOT.current_christian_acceptance < 30 }

			}				

		}

		else_if = {

			limit = {

				has_idea = jap_church_4

			}

			custom_trigger_tooltip = {

				tooltip = church_acceptance_greater_than_50 #it's actually smaller than, but this won't be seen

				check_variable = { ROOT.current_christian_acceptance < 50 }

			}

		}

		else_if = {

			limit = {

				has_idea = jap_church_5

			}

			custom_trigger_tooltip = {

				tooltip = church_acceptance_greater_than_70 #it's actually smaller than, but this won't be seen

				check_variable = { ROOT.current_christian_acceptance < 70 }

			}

		}

		else_if = {

			limit = {

				has_idea = jap_church_6

			}

			custom_trigger_tooltip = {

				tooltip = church_acceptance_greater_than_90 #it's actually smaller than, but this won't be seen

				check_variable = { ROOT.current_christian_acceptance < 90 }

			}

		}

	}

	mean_time_to_happen = {

		days = 15

	}

	option = {

		name = rcmjapan_christian.2.a

		if = {

			limit = {

				has_idea = jap_church_6

			}

			swap_ideas = {

				remove_idea = jap_church_6

				add_idea = jap_church_5

			}

		}

		else_if = {

			limit = {

				has_idea = jap_church_5

			}

			swap_ideas = {

				remove_idea = jap_church_5

				add_idea = jap_church_4

			}

		}

		else_if = {

			limit = {

				has_idea = jap_church_4

			}

			swap_ideas = {

				remove_idea = jap_church_4

				add_idea = jap_church_3

			}

		}

		else_if = {

			limit = {

				has_idea = jap_church_3

			}

			swap_ideas = {

				remove_idea = jap_church_3

				add_idea = jap_church_2

			}

		}

		else_if = {

country_event = { 

	id = AWR_CHI.3551 #十胜反对新宗教迫害禁令

	title = rcmjapan_christian_ban_persecution_backlash.1.t

	desc = rcmjapan_christian_ban_persecution_backlash.1.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_asian_unrest_2

	#immediate = {log = "[GetDateText]: [Root.GetName]: event AWR_CHI.3507"}

	#fire_only_once = yes

	is_triggered_only = yes

	immediate = {

		JAP = {

			set_country_flag = crack_down_in_process_christian

		}

		996 = {

			set_state_flag = This_state_has_backlash

		}

	}

	option = {

		name = rcmjapan_christian_ban_persecution_backlash.1.a

		trigger = {

			always = no #this cause bugs, player can use decision later

		}

		custom_effect_tooltip = Back_lash_active

		996 = {

			save_global_event_target_as = pacify_christian_state

		}

		JAP = {			

			clr_country_flag = crack_down_in_process_christian

			activate_mission = RCM_send_in_the_garrison_mission

		}

	}

	option = {

		name = rcmjapan_christian_ban_persecution_backlash.1.b

		custom_effect_tooltip = Back_lash_active

		JAP = {			

			clr_country_flag = crack_down_in_process_christian

		}

	}

}

		528 = {

			save_global_event_target_as = pacify_christian_state

		}

		JAP = {			

			clr_country_flag = crack_down_in_process_christian

			activate_mission = RCM_send_in_the_garrison_mission

		}

	}

	option = {

		name = rcmjapan_christian_ban_persecution_backlash.12.b

		custom_effect_tooltip = Back_lash_active

		JAP = {			

			clr_country_flag = crack_down_in_process_christian

		}

	}

}

	is_triggered_only = yes

	trigger = {

		tag = JAP

	}

	immediate = {

		hidden_effect = {

			ROOT = {

				sound_effect = baseball_1

			}

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				NOT = { has_country_flag = stake_level_1 }

				NOT = { has_country_flag = stake_level_2 }

				NOT = { has_country_flag = stake_level_3 }

			}

			set_country_flag = stake_level_1

		}

	}

	option = {

		name = rcmjapan_baseball_news.1.a		

		if = {

			limit = {

				NOT = { has_country_flag = opt_out_of_baseball_bets }

			}

			country_event = AWR_CHI.3607

		}

	}

}

		}

	desc = rcmjapan_pm.13.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_generic_read_write

	is_triggered_only = no

    fire_only_once = yes

	trigger = {

		original_tag = JAP

		has_country_leader = {

			character = kuniaki_koiso ruling_only = yes

		}

		any_enemy_country = {

			is_literally_china = yes

		}

		any_enemy_country = {

			is_major = yes

			OR = {

				capital_scope = { is_on_continent = europe }

				capital_scope = { is_on_continent =	north_america }

			}

			naval_strength_comparison = {

				other = JAP

				#tooltip = my_loc_key_tt

				ratio > 1.15

			    sub_unit_def_weights = {

					carrier = 5

					battleship = 2

			    }

			}

		}

		USA = {

			is_subject = no

			has_capitulated = no

			surrender_progress < 0.05

		}

		war_length_with = {

			tag = USA

			months > 41

		}

		surrender_progress > 0

	}

	option = {

		name = rcmjapan_pm.13.a

		ai_chance = {

			base = 100

		}

		retire_country_leader = yes

		kantaro_suzuki = {

            add_country_leader_role = {

				country_leader = {

					expire = "1965.1.1"

					ideology = fascism_ideology

					traits = {

					}

				}

				promote_leader = yes

			} 	  

		}

		set_party_name = {

			ideology = neutrality

			name = joyaku_ha_tt

			long_name = joyaku_ha_party_long

		}

		add_popularity = {

			ideology = neutrality

			popularity = 0.45

		}

		set_politics = {

			ruling_party = neutrality

			elections_allowed = yes

		}

		

		create_country_leader = { #guo

			name="铃木贯太郎"

			#desc=POLITICS_SOKOLOVKSY_DESC

			picture = "gfx/leaders/JAP/kantaro_suzuki.dds"

			ideology = moderatism

			traits = { emergency_powers tenacious_negotiator }

		}

        add_political_power = -100		

		add_stability = 0.1		

		add_war_support = -0.25

	}

}

news_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI_news.604 #中国民主同盟成立

	title = news.1301.t

	desc = news.1301.d

	picture = GFX_news_event_cdl

	fire_only_once = yes

	major = no

	mean_time_to_happen = {

		days = 2

	}

	trigger = {

		tag = CHI

		NOT = {		

		CHI = { has_government = fascism }		

		}		

		OR = {

			JAP = {

				has_completed_focus = JAP_contact_zhang_lan_focus

				event_target:WTT_current_china_leader = {

					democratic > 0.35

				}

			}

			AND = {

				NOT = {

					has_completed_focus = CHI_begin_constitionalization_focus

				}

				OR = {

					CHI = { has_government = fascism }

					CHI = { has_government = neutrality }

				}

				OR = {

					date > 1941.3.18

					has_global_flag = CHI_zhang_lan_doctrine

					

				}

			}

		}

	}



	immediate = {

		hidden_effect = {

			CHI = {

				set_temp_variable = { CDL_pop = ROOT.party_popularity@n_socialism }

				set_temp_variable = { dem_pop = ROOT.party_popularity@democratic }

				add_to_variable = { CDL_pop = dem_pop }



				set_political_party = { ideology = communism popularity = 0 }

				set_political_party = { ideology = n_socialism popularity = 0 }

				add_popularity = { ideology = democratic popularity = CDL_pop }

				set_party_name = { ideology = democratic long_name = CHI_n_socialism_cdl_long name = CHI_n_socialism_cdl }

				add_timed_idea = {

					idea = pro_com_demo

					days = 1850

				}

				set_global_flag = cdl_founded

				#set_country_flag = zhang_bojun_available

				#add_ideas = zhang_bojun

				#remove_ideas = zhang_bojun



				create_country_leader = {

					name = Zhang_Lan

					desc = "POLITICS_ZHANG_LAN_DESC"

					picture = "Portrait_China_Zhang_Lan.dds"

					expire = "1965.1.1"

					ideology = socialism

					traits = {

						#

					}

				}

			}

		}

	}



	option = {

		name = news.1301.a

		trigger = {

			NOT = {

				TAG = event_target:WTT_communist_china

				TAG = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader

			}

		}

	}

	option = {

		name = news.1301.b

		trigger = { TAG = event_target:WTT_communist_china }

	}

	option = {

		name = news.1301.c

		trigger = { TAG = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader }

	}

}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.4139 #西安事变

	title = rcmsoviet.18.t

	desc = rcmsoviet.18.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_xian_zhang_yang



	is_triggered_only = yes











	fire_only_once = yes



	#mean_time_to_happen = {

	#	days = 10

	#}

	immediate = {

		hidden_effect = {

			NEA = {

				drop_cosmetic_tag = yes

			}

			set_global_flag = xian_incident_flag

			CHI = {

				white_peace = PRC			    

			}

		   CHI = {

		   if = {

		   limit = {

		   has_country_leader = {

		    ruling_only = yes character = CHI_chiang_kai_shek

		   }

		   }

		   add_country_leader_trait = CHI_kouliu #guo		

		   set_country_leader_portrait = {

		     portrait = "gfx/leaders/CHI/The Chianging/Chiang_Old_v1.dds"

		   }

		   CHI_chiang_kai_shek = {

		   set_portraits = {

			army={

				large="gfx/leaders/CHI/The Chianging/Chiang_Old_v1.dds"

			}

		   }

	       }

		   }

		   }			

			####

			1030 = {

				set_demilitarized_zone = no

				clr_state_flag = I_choose_this_state_to_DMZ

			}

			1053 = {

				set_demilitarized_zone = no

				clr_state_flag = I_choose_this_state_to_DMZ

			}



			####

			CHI = {

				end_puppet = NEA

			}

			

			PRC = {

				add_opinion_modifier = {

					target = NEA modifier = tacit_agreement

				}

				reverse_add_opinion_modifier = {

					target = NEA modifier = tacit_agreement

				}

			}

		}

	}



	# Enter negotiations with Communist China

	option = {

		name = rcmsoviet.18.a

		ai_chance = {

			base = 20

			modifier = {

				add = -20

				has_game_rule = {

					rule = NEA_AI_BEHAVIOR

					option = NEVER_CONCEDE

				}

			}

		}

		custom_effect_tooltip = THIS_IS_HISTORICAL_TT

		PRC = { country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.3679 days = 1 } }		

		hidden_effect = {

		if = {

		limit = {

		NOT = { has_global_flag = Secret_Northwest_Alliance }		

		}		

		CHI = { country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.3675 days = 52 } }

		PRC = { country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.3676 days = 52 } }		

		}		

		PRC = { dismantle_faction = yes }		

		annex_country = {

		target = XII

		transfer_troops = no

		}		

		1053 = { remove_core_of = XII }

		283 = { remove_core_of = XII }					

			283 = {

				transfer_state_to = NEA

			}

			1053 = {

				transfer_state_to = NEA

			}					

		}					

	}



	# Refuse to negotiate

	option = {

		name = rcmsoviet.18.b	

		NEA = { country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.3681 days = 1 } }

		hidden_effect = {

        set_global_flag = CHI_Zhongyuan

		set_global_flag = Super_Event_Visible

			283 = {

				transfer_state_to = NEA

			}

			1053 = {

				transfer_state_to = NEA

			}			

	    play_song = "战国七雄"				

			XII = {

				declare_war_on = {

					target = PRC

					type = annex_everything

				}

			}

			XII = {

				declare_war_on = {

					target = NEA

					type = annex_everything

				}

			}

				country_event = {

					id = AWR_CHI.3678 days = 3

				}			

			}					

		ai_chance = {

			base = 0

			modifier = {

				add = 20

				has_game_rule = {

					rule = NEA_AI_BEHAVIOR

					option = NEVER_CONCEDE

				}

			}

			#modifier = {

			#	add = 300

			#	NEA = { has_war_with = CHI }

			#}

		}

		custom_effect_tooltip = CHI_usa_civil_war_warning_fire_now_tt

		effect_tooltip = {

			if = {

				limit = {

					SHD = {

						is_subject_of = ROOT

					}

				}

				end_puppet = SHD

			}	

		}

		set_global_flag = CHI_no_national_front_flag

		#custom_effect_tooltip = CHI_no_united_front

	}

}

	id = AWR_CHI.3679 #西安事变: 国民党提议停战

	desc = rcmsoviet.19.d

		ai_chance = { factor = 100 }

		#custom_effect_tooltip = chinese_sov_rep_dissolves

		#hidden_effect = {

			#set_cosmetic_tag = PRC_SGN

		#}

		

		

		hidden_effect = {#GUO

		   CHI = {

		   remove_country_leader_trait = CHI_kouliu #guo

		   if = {

		   limit = {

		   has_country_leader = {

		    ruling_only = yes character = CHI_chiang_kai_shek

		   }

		   }

		   set_country_leader_portrait = {

		     portrait = "gfx/leaders/CHI/Portrait_CHI_Chiang_Kai_Shek.dds"

		   }

		   CHI_chiang_kai_shek = {

		   set_portraits = {

			army={

				large="gfx/leaders/CHI/Portrait_CHI_Chiang_Kai_Shek.dds"

			}

		   }

	       }		   

		   }		   

		   }		

			if = {

				limit = {

				not = { has_global_flag = Secret_Northwest_Alliance }

				}

				news_event = {

					id = AWR_CHI_news.652

				}

			}

			NEA = {

				drop_cosmetic_tag = yes

			}

		}

		if = {#GUO

				limit = {

					has_war_with = NEA

				}

				NEA = {

					white_peace = PRC

				}

			}

		if = {#GUO

		limit = { has_global_flag = Secret_Northwest_Alliance }

		unlock_decision_tooltip = opposition_clashes_with_CHI

		}

		

		set_global_flag = CHI_unite_PRC

		remove_opinion_modifier = { target = CHI modifier = hostile_status }

		CHI = {

			remove_opinion_modifier = { target = PRC modifier = hostile_status }

		}

		set_global_flag = second_unite_bypass

		CHI = { unlock_national_focus = CHI_Truce_of_the_Civil_War }

		CHI = {

			white_peace = PRC

		    diplomatic_relation = {

                country = PRC

                relation = non_aggression_pact

            }

		}

		every_country = {

			limit = {

                is_in_faction_with = CHI

				NOT = { tag = CHI }

            }

			white_peace = PRC

			white_peace = GXC

			white_peace = GUD

        }

		every_country = {

			limit = {

                is_in_faction_with = PRC

				NOT = { tag = PRC }

            }

			white_peace = CHI

            diplomatic_relation = {

                country = CHI

                relation = non_aggression_pact

            }

		}

		NEA = {

			country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.3685 days = 1 }

		}

	}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.3692 #失去中国东北的土地

	title = rcmsoviet.1000.t

	desc = rcmsoviet.1000.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_japanese_pow



	fire_only_once = yes

	mean_time_to_happen = {

		days = 15

	}

	trigger = {

		tag = SOV

		owns_state = 219

		has_war_with = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader

		

		if = {#guo

			limit = { JAP = { is_subject = no } }

			NOT = {

				has_war_with = JAP

			}

		}

		else = { always = yes }

		

		OR = {

			612 = { is_controlled_by = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader }

			715 = { is_controlled_by = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader }

			716 = { is_controlled_by = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader }

		}

	}

	option = {

		name = rcmsoviet.1000.a

		ai_chance = { factor = 100 }#guo

		event_target:WTT_current_china_leader = {

			country_event = { days = 5 id = AWR_CHI.3693 }

		}

		hidden_effect = {

			set_global_flag = retreat_from_CHI

		}

	}



	option = {

		name = rcmsoviet.1000.b

		ai_chance = { factor = 0 }

		hidden_effect = {

			set_global_flag = retreat_from_CHI

		}

	}

}

country_event = { days = 5 id = AWR_CHI.3693 }

			}

		}

		else = { always = yes }

			761 = { is_controlled_by = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader }

			1008 = { is_controlled_by = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader }

			608 = { is_controlled_by = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader }

			330 = { is_controlled_by = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader }

		}

	}

	}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.3696 #苏日中立条约

	title = rcmsoviet.1003.t

	desc = rcmsoviet.1003.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_soviet_japanese_pact

	fire_only_once = yes

	is_triggered_only = yes



	option = { #accept

		name = rcmsoviet.1003.a

		ai_chance = {

			base = 70

			modifier = {

				factor = 100

				is_historical_focus_on = yes

			}

		}

		JAP = {

			add_ideas = jap_sov_pact

			add_opinion_modifier = { target = SOV modifier = jap_sov_pact_opinion }

			add_opinion_modifier = { target = SOV modifier = jap_sov_pact_opinion_trade }

			set_global_flag = jap_sov_pact_flag

			diplomatic_relation = {

				country = SOV

				relation = non_aggression_pact

				active = yes

			}

		}

		add_opinion_modifier = { target = JAP modifier = jap_sov_pact_opinion }

		hidden_effect = { JAP = { country_event = { days = 2 id = AWR_CHI.3700 } } }

		custom_effect_tooltip = prc_cant_contact_northeast_tt

		#guoeffect_tooltip = {

        #guo    event_target:WTT_communist_china = {

		#guo		every_core_state = {

		#guo			limit = {

		#guo				is_MAN_state_for_liberation = yes

		#guo			}

		#guo			remove_core_of = event_target:WTT_communist_china

		#guo		}

		#guo	}

		#guo}

		event_target:WTT_communist_china = {

			country_event = { days = 2 id = AWR_CHI.3701 } 

		} 

	}



	option = { #refuse

		name = rcmsoviet.1003.b

		ai_chance = {

			base = 30

			modifier = {

				factor = 0

				is_historical_focus_on = yes

			}

		}

		JAP = { country_event = { days = 2 id = AWR_CHI.3702 } }

	}

}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.3701 #莫斯科签署苏日中立条约

	desc = rcmsoviet.10044.d

			JAP = {

				add_ideas = jap_sov_pact

				add_opinion_modifier = { target = SOV modifier = jap_sov_pact_opinion_trade }

				set_global_flag = jap_sov_pact_flag

				diplomatic_relation = {

					country = SOV

					relation = non_aggression_pact

					active = yes

				}

			}

		}

	    custom_effect_tooltip = prc_cant_contact_northeast_tt

		every_state = {

			limit = {

				has_state_flag = commie_ridden_states

				is_MAN_state_for_liberation = yes

			}

			set_border_war = no

		    clr_state_flag = commie_ridden_states

		}

		every_state = { #guo

				limit = {

					is_MAN_state_for_liberation = yes

					has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = PRC_dongbeikanglian_genjudi scope = JAP }

				}

				clr_state_flag = PRC_dongbeikanglian_genjudi

			    remove_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = PRC_dongbeikanglian_genjudi scope = JAP }

		}

		#guoevery_core_state = {

		#guo	limit = {

		#guo		is_MAN_state_for_liberation = yes

		#guo	}

		#guo	remove_core_of = ROOT

		#guo}

	}

}

		SOV = { remove_opinion_modifier = { target = JAP modifier = jap_sov_pact_opinion_trade } }

		}

	}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.3720 #派往中国的新顾问

	title = rcmsoviet.1013.t

	desc = rcmsoviet.1013.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_soviet_purge_trial

	fire_only_once = yes

	is_triggered_only = yes



	option = { #refuse

		name = rcmsoviet.1013.a

		event_target:WTT_current_china_leader = {

			set_global_flag = second_term_sov_advisor

			if = {

				limit = {

					has_idea = CHI_pavel_zhigarev

				}

				remove_ideas = CHI_pavel_zhigarev

				hidden_effect = {

					add_ideas = CHI_pavel_zhigarev

					remove_ideas = CHI_pavel_zhigarev

				}

				add_ideas = CHI_gregory_thor

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					NOT = {

						has_idea = CHI_pavel_zhigarev

					}

				}

				custom_effect_tooltip = remove_foreign_advisor

				show_ideas_tooltip = CHI_pavel_zhigarev

				hidden_effect = {

					add_ideas = CHI_pavel_zhigarev

					remove_ideas = CHI_pavel_zhigarev

					add_ideas = CHI_pavel_zhigarev

					remove_ideas = CHI_pavel_zhigarev

				}

				custom_effect_tooltip = available_foreign_advisor

				show_ideas_tooltip = CHI_gregory_thor

			}

		}

		hidden_effect = {

			event_target:WTT_current_china_leader = { country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.3726 } }

		}

	}

}

							}

						has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

					}

						target = JAP

						autonomy_state = autonomy_supervised_state

					}

				}

				}					

				}

						}

					}

				}

		}

	id = AWR_CHI.3753 #德苏联盟

	title = rcmsoviet.89.t

	desc = rcmsoviet.89.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_molotov_ribbentrop_stalin_pact



	is_triggered_only = yes

	

	option = {

		name = rcmsoviet.89.a

		dismantle_faction = yes

		add_stability = -0.05

		set_global_flag = unholy_alliance_flag

		every_other_country = {

			limit = {

				OR = {

					AND = {

						NOT = { tag = SOV }

						has_government = communism 

						NOT = {

							is_in_faction_with = SOV

						}

					}

					has_government = democratic 

				}

			}

			add_opinion_modifier = { target = GER modifier = unholy_alliance }

		}

		GER = {

			add_stability = -0.1

		}

		SOV = {

			every_other_country = {

				limit = {

					is_in_faction_with = ROOT

				}

				set_country_flag = former_comintern_member_flag

			}

			every_other_country = {

				limit = {

					is_in_faction_with = GER

				}

				set_country_flag = former_axis_member_flag

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					is_faction_leader = yes

				}

				dismantle_faction = yes

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					is_in_faction  = yes

				}

				remove_from_faction = SOV

			}

			

			create_faction = "the_moscow_Berlin_axis"

			add_to_faction = GER

			every_other_country = {

				limit = {

					OR = {

						has_country_flag = former_axis_member_flag

						has_country_flag = former_comintern_member_flag

					}

				}

				ROOT = {

					add_to_faction = PREV

				}

			}

			add_named_threat = { threat = 10 name = rcmsoviet.89.t }

			every_other_country = {

				limit = {

					NOT = {

						is_in_faction_with = SOV

					}

					has_government = communism 

				}

				add_opinion_modifier = { target = SOV modifier = medium_decrease }

			}

			every_other_country = {

				limit = {

					has_government = democratic 

				}

				add_opinion_modifier = { target = GER modifier = unholy_alliance }

			}

		}

		hidden_effect = { 

			# Britain can rally democracies

			ENG = {

				country_event = { days = 3 id = AWR_CHI.3754 }

			}

			# US drops communism/fascism

			USA = {

				country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.3755 }

				country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.3756 }

			}

		}

	}

	

	option = {

		name = rcmsoviet.89.b

		ai_chance = { factor = 0 }

		SOV = {

			country_event = AWR_CHI.3757

			effect_tooltip = {

				remove_ideas = soviet_german_friendship

				create_wargoal = {

					type = puppet_wargoal_focus

					target = GER

				}

			}

		}

		remove_opinion_modifier = { target = SOV modifier = ger_sov_alliance_focus }

		remove_ideas = soviet_german_friendship

	}

		}

			}

		}

		show_ideas_tooltip = MEX_leon_trotsky

	}

		name = rcmUSA.10.c

				}

				}

			}

		}

	id = AWR_CHI.3858 #撤退到宁夏？

	title = nxm.3.t

	desc = nxm.3.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_ma_hongkui_ousted

	is_triggered_only = yes 



	option = {

		name = nxm.3.a

		#join ningsia

		trigger = {

			NXM = {

				exists = yes

				NOT = {

					has_war_with = ROOT

					has_border_war_with = ROOT

				}

			}

		}

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 15

			modifier = {

				factor = 100

				is_historical_focus_on = yes

			}

		}

		custom_effect_tooltip = THIS_IS_HISTORICAL_TT

		NXM = {

			country_event = AWR_CHI.3859

		}

		transfer_units_fraction = {

			target = NXM       # the recipient

			size = 1           # [0,1] Default value for the ratio below if they are not specified

			army_ratio = 1       # [0,1] Overrides size modifier for army

			stockpile_ratio = 1  # [0,1] Overrides size modifier for the stockpiled equipment and fuel

			navy_ratio = 1     # [0,1] Overrides size modifier for navy

			air_ratio = 1       # [0,1] Overrides size modifier for air

			keep_unit_leaders_trigger = { # Trigger for unit leaders to remain with the original country

				always = yes

			}

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				has_war_with = PRC

			}

			every_owned_state = {

				limit = {

					OR = {

						state = 1029

						state = 1031

						state = 1044

					}

				}

				transfer_state_to = PRC

			}

		}

		hidden_effect = {

			NXM_ma_hongbin = {

                remove_country_leader_role = {

					ideology = despotism

					ideology = fascism_ideology

					ideology = conservatism

					ideology = marxism

					ideology = n_socialism_ideology

				}

			}

			

		}

		every_unit_leader = {

			limit = {

				OR = {

					is_character = NXM_ma_hongbin

					#is_character = NXM_ma_tengjiao

					is_character = NXM_ma_duijing

				}

			}

			set_nationality = NXM

		}

		#NXM = {

		#	annex_country = { target = ROOT transfer_troops = yes }

		#}

		if = {

			limit = {

				NXM = {

					is_ai = yes

				}

			}

			NXM = {

				change_tag_from = ROOT

			}

			else = {

				custom_effect_tooltip = GAME_OVER_TT

			}

		}

	}



	option = {

		name = nxm.3.b

		#no

		add_war_support = 0.1

	}

}

	id = AWR_CHI.3869 #[756.GetName] 的共党崛起

	desc = qng.3.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_mong_army_01

	fire_only_once = yes

	#is_triggered_only = yes

		tag = XSM

		date < 1938.5.1

		PRC = {

			has_war_with = GSM

			#controls_province = 12327

			controls_province = 5057

		}

	}

	mean_time_to_happen = {

		days = 2

	}

	option = {

		name = qng.3.a

		#transfer_units_fraction = {

		#	target = GSM          # the recipient

		#	size = 0            # [0,1] Default value for the ratio below if they are not specified

		#	army_ratio = 0.15       # [0,1] Overrides size modifier for army

			#stockpile_ratio = 0.3  # [0,1] Overrides size modifier for the stockpiled equipment and fuel

			#navy_ratio = 0.2       # [0,1] Overrides size modifier for navy

			#air_ratio = 0.4        # [0,1] Overrides size modifier for air

		#	keep_unit_leaders_trigger = { # Trigger for unit leaders to remain with the original country

		#		always = yes

		#	}

		#}

		set_global_flag = prc_adv_1_flag

		if = {

			limit = {

				has_manpower > 2999

			}

			add_manpower = -3000

			GSM = {

				add_manpower = 3000

			}

		}

		GSM = {

			add_offsite_building = {

				type = arms_factory

				level = 1

			}

			add_to_variable = { GSM.ammunition_variable = 6 }

		}

		custom_effect_tooltip = give_some_ammo

		XSM = {

			add_to_variable = { ammunition_variable = -6 }

		}

	}

}

		    is_owned_and_controlled_by = SHC

		}

			621 = {

				owner = {

					#controls_state = 621

					has_war_together_with = ROOT

					NOT = {

						is_ally_with = JAP

					}					

				}

			}

			615 = {

				owner = {

					#controls_state = 621

					has_war_together_with = ROOT

					NOT = {

						is_ally_with = JAP

					}

				}

			}

		}

		ROOT = {

			is_neighbor_of = event_target:WTT_communist_china

		}

	}

	immediate = {

			if = {

				limit = {

						owner = {

							#controls_state = 621

							NOT = {

								is_ally_with = JAP

							}

						}

					}

				}

					owner = {

					}

				}

			}

			else = {

				615 = {

					owner = {

						save_global_event_target_as = suiyuan_owner

					}

				}

			}

		}

	}

	mean_time_to_happen = {

		days = 6

	}

	option = {

		name = shc.6.a

		custom_effect_tooltip = THIS_IS_HISTORICAL_TT

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 10

		}

		

		#event_target:suiyuan_owner

			country_event = AWR_CHI.3882

		}

		event_target:WTT_communist_china = {

			country_event = AWR_CHI.3883

		}

		transfer_units_fraction = {

			#target = event_target:suiyuan_owner '

			target = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader     # the recipient

			size = 0.1    

			keep_unit_leaders_trigger = { # Trigger for unit leaders to remain with the original country

				always = yes

			}

		}

		#SHC_gao_shuangcheng = {

		#	hidden_effect = {

        #        remove_country_leader_role = {

		#			ideology = despotism

		#		}

		#		remove_country_leader_role = {

		#			ideology = fascism_ideology

		#		}

		#		remove_country_leader_role = {

		#			ideology = conservatism

		#		}

		#		remove_country_leader_role = {

		#			ideology = n_socialism_ideology

		#		}

		#		remove_country_leader_role = {

		#			ideology = marxism

		#		}

		#	}	

		#	set_nationality = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader

		#}

			set_nationality = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader

		}

country_event = { #ikechao incident

	id = AWR_CHI.3892 #控制[746.GetName]？

	title = suy.3.t

	desc = suy.3.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_SOV_mongolia_cavalry

	#fire_only_once = yes

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {

		name = suy.3.a

		#crack down mongolians

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 90

		}

		custom_effect_tooltip = THIS_IS_HISTORICAL_TT

		if = {

			limit = {

				746 = {

					has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = chi_mon_autonomy }

				}

			}

			746 = {

				if = {

					limit = {

						has_state_flag = chi_mon_autonomy_flag

					}

					clr_state_flag = chi_mon_autonomy_flag

				}

				remove_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = chi_mon_autonomy }

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					NOT = {

						has_government = communism

					}

					any_neighbor_country = {

						tag = event_target:WTT_communist_china

					}

				}

				custom_effect_tooltip = may_trigger_mongolian_rebellion_tt

				event_target:WTT_communist_china = {

					country_event = {

						id = AWR_CHI.3894 days = 3

					}

				}

			    else = {

					add_war_support = -0.1

					add_political_power = -100

					746 = {

						add_extra_state_shared_building_slots = 1

						add_building_construction = {

							type = industrial_complex

							level = 1

							instant_build = yes

						}

					}

				}

			}

		}	

        if = {

			limit = {

				746 = { 

					has_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = chi_mon_autonomy_weak }

				}

			}

			746 = {

				remove_dynamic_modifier = { modifier = chi_mon_autonomy_weak }

			}

			add_war_support = -0.08

		}

	}

	option = {

		name = suy.3.b

		#give up

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 0

		}

		add_political_power = -25

	}

}

					}

		}

		add_war_support = -0.1

		FROM = { 

			country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.3903 days = 3 }

		}

		news_event = { days = 3 id = AWR_CHI_news.659 }

		#custom_effect_tooltip = if_they_accept_green

		effect_tooltip = {

			set_autonomy = {

				target = ROOT

				autonomy_state = autonomy_free

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					has_cosmetic_tag = huabei_bandit_supression_hq

				}

				drop_cosmetic_tag = yes

			}

			SHX_Dong_Qiwu = {

			    add_country_leader_role = {

			        promote_leader = yes

				    country_leader = {

				        expire = "1965.1.1"

				        ideology = despotism

				        traits = { }            

			        } 

			    } 

			}

			every_owned_state = {

				limit = {

					NOT = { #suiyuan

                        state = 621

						state = 746

						state = 1019

						state = 1020

						state = 1014

					}

				}

				event_target:WTT_communist_china = {

					transfer_state = PREV

				}

			} 

			diplomatic_relation = {

                country = FROM

                relation = non_aggression_pact

            }

		} 

	}

	option = {

		name = nhq.1.b

		#refuse

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 1

		}

		add_war_support = 0.05

		FROM = { 

			country_event = { id = AWR_SIK.239 days = 3 }

		}

	}

}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.3908 #绥远起义？

	title = nhq.3.t

	desc = nhq.3.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_chinese_civil_war

	#fire_only_once = yes

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {

		name = nhq.3.a

		#peace with prc

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 100

		}

		custom_effect_tooltip = THIS_IS_HISTORICAL_TT

		FROM = { 

			country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.3912 days = 3 }

		}

		event_target:WTT_current_china_leader = {

			country_event = {

				id = AWR_CHI.3910 days = 3 

			}

		}

		#custom_effect_tooltip = if_they_accept_green

		effect_tooltip = {

		    every_unit_leader = {

				limit = {

					NOT = {

						is_character = SHX_Dong_Qiwu

					}   

				}

				retire = yes

			}

			FROM = {

				annex_country = { target = ROOT transfer_troops = yes }		

			}

		} 

	}

	option = {

		name = nhq.1.b

		#refuse

		add_war_support = 0.05

		FROM = { 

			country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.3913 days = 3 }

		}

		effect_tooltip = {

			FROM = {

				create_wargoal = {

			        type = annex_everything

			        target = ROOT

		        }

			}

		}

	}

}

	id = AWR_CHI.3913 #[From.GetLeader] 拒绝投共

	desc = nhq.5.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_chinese_civil_war

	#fire_only_once = yes

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {

		name = nhq.5.a

			limit = {

				is_ai = no

			}

				target = ROOT

			}

			}

		}	

	}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.3915 #邓锡侯掌权

	title = sic.1.t

	desc = sic.1.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_generic_sign_treaty1

	fire_only_once = yes

	is_triggered_only = no

	trigger = {

		has_global_flag = CHI_no_longer_united_flag

		tag = SIC

	    has_country_leader = {

			character = SIC_Deng_Xihou ruling_only = yes

		}

		is_subject_of = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader

		has_autonomy_state = autonomy_rcm_national_revolutionary_army	

	}

	option = {

		name = sic.1.a

		if = {

			limit = {

				tag = SIC

			}

			overlord = {

				country_event = {

					id = AWR_CHI.3915 hours = 12

				}

				set_autonomy = {

					target = ROOT

					autonomy_state = autonomy_rcm_provincial_government

				}		

			}

			add_political_power = 100

			add_stability = 0.05

			else = {

				effect_tooltip = {

					SIC = {

						overlord = {

							set_autonomy = {

								target = ROOT

								autonomy_state = autonomy_rcm_provincial_government

							}

						}

						add_political_power = 100

						add_stability = 0.05

					}

				}

				add_stability = 0.03

			}

		}	

	}

}

					id = AWR_CHI.3915 hours = 12

				}

		every_enemy_country = {

			limit = {

				OR = {

					tag = JAP

					is_ally_with = JAP

				}

			}

			white_peace = ROOT

		}

		#set_rule = { can_create_factions = yes }

		create_faction = "southwest_rebel_faction"

		every_other_country = {

            limit = {

				OR = {

					tag = YUN

					tag = XIK

				}

				is_subject = no

				NOT = {

					has_war_with = ROOT

				}

			}

			country_event = {

                id = AWR_CHI.3921 hours = 12

			}	

		}

	}

}

		name = sic.6.a

			}

		}

				#set_rule = { can_create_factions = yes }

			}

		}

	}

		}

				}

		}

		}

	}

country_event = { #SIC generals join CHI to SIC

	id = AWR_CHI.3925 #多名川系将军投向[WTT_current_china_leader.GetLeader]

	title = sic.7.t

	desc = sic.7.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_chinese_soldiers

	is_triggered_only = yes 

	

	option = {

		name = sic.7.a

		effect_tooltip = {

			if = {

				limit = {

					NOT = {

						has_country_leader = {

							character = SIC_liu_xiang ruling_only = yes

						}

					}

					owns_state = 1041

					NOT = {

						controls_state = 1041

					}

				}

			    1041 = {

					set_state_owner_to = FROM

				}

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					owns_state = 751

					NOT = {

						controls_state = 751

					}

				}

			    751 = {

					set_state_owner_to = FROM

				}

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					NOT = {

						has_country_leader = {

							character = SIC_liu_xiang ruling_only = yes

						}

					}

					1041 = {

						is_owned_and_controlled_by = ROOT

					}

				}

				1041 = {

					transfer_state_to = FROM

				}

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					751 = {

						is_owned_and_controlled_by = ROOT

					}

				}

				751 = {

					transfer_state_to = FROM

				}

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					NOT = {

						has_country_leader = {

							character = SIC_liu_xiang ruling_only = yes

						}

					}

				}

				every_unit_leader = {

					limit = {

						OR = {

							is_character = SIC_Wang_Lingji

							#is_character = SIC_Wang_Zuanxu

							is_character = SIC_Yang_Sen

							is_character = SIC_Tang_Shizun

							is_character = SIC_Sun_Zhen

							is_character = SIC_Li_Jiayu

						}

					}

					set_nationality = FROM

				}

				else = {

					every_unit_leader = {

						limit = {

							OR = {

								#is_character = SIC_Wang_Lingji

								#is_character = SIC_Wang_Zuanxu

								is_character = SIC_Yang_Sen

								#is_character = SIC_Tang_Shizun

								is_character = SIC_Sun_Zhen

								is_character = SIC_Li_Jiayu

							}

						}

						set_nationality = FROM

					}

				}

			}

			transfer_units_fraction = {

			    target = FROM   # the recipient			                      

			    size = 0 

				army_ratio = 0.5      # Overrides size modifier for army

			    stockpile_ratio = 0  # [0,1] Overrides size modifier for the stockpiled equipment and fuel

			    navy_ratio = 0       # [0,1] Overrides size modifier for navy

			    air_ratio = 0        # [0,1] Overrides size modifier for air

				keep_unit_leaders_trigger = { # Trigger for unit leaders to remain with the original country

				    always = yes

			    }

		    }

		}

		FROM = {

			country_event = {

				id = AWR_CHI.3927 hours = 12

			}

		}

	}

}

						}

					}

					limit = {

						OR = {

							is_character = SIC_Wang_Lingji

							is_character = SIC_Yang_Sen

							is_character = SIC_Tang_Shizun

							is_character = SIC_Sun_Zhen

							is_character = SIC_Li_Jiayu

						}

					}

				}

								#is_character = SIC_Wang_Lingji

						}

					}

				}

			}

			transfer_units_fraction = {

			    target = ROOT       # the recipient			                      

			    size = 0 

				army_ratio = 0.5      # Overrides size modifier for army

			    stockpile_ratio = 0  # [0,1] Overrides size modifier for the stockpiled equipment and fuel

			    navy_ratio = 0       # [0,1] Overrides size modifier for navy

			    air_ratio = 0        # [0,1] Overrides size modifier for air

				keep_unit_leaders_trigger = { # Trigger for unit leaders to remain with the original country

				    always = yes

			    }

		    }

		}

		SIC = {

			if = {

				limit = {

					NOT = {

						has_country_leader = {

							character = SIC_liu_xiang ruling_only = yes

						}

					}

				}

			    every_owned_state = {

					limit = {

						OR = {

							state = 1041

							#state = 1023

							state = 605

							state = 751

						}

					}

					transfer_state_to = ROOT

				}

			}

		}

	}

country_event = { #Li Jishen Dismissed (inviter hidden)

	id = AWR_CHI.3948

	#fire_only_once = yes

	hidden = yes

	is_triggered_only = yes

	#mean_time_to_happen = {

	#	days = 8

	#}

	immediate = {

		clr_country_flag = liu_jianqun_invited_country

		save_event_target_as = previous_inviter

		for_each_scope_loop = {

			array = global.literally_china_including_chinese_puppets

			if = {

				limit = { OR = { is_originally_warlord = yes tag = PLM } NOT = { tag = ROOT } }

				country_event = AWR_CHI.3949

			}

		}

		clr_global_flag = liu_jianqun_invited

	}

	option = {

	}

}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.3958 #[amass_support_flag_temp.GetName] 中的大众支持度上升

	title = RCM_popular_uprising.5.t

	desc = RCM_popular_uprising.5.d

	is_triggered_only = yes

	immediate = {

	}

	picture = GFX_report_event_chinese_soldiers_city_ruin

	#fire_only_once = yes

	

	option = { #OH YEA!(to PRC)

		name = RCM_popular_uprising.5.b

		trigger = {

			tag = event_target:WTT_popular_china

		}

		effect_tooltip = {

			event_target:amass_support_flag_temp = {

				add_core_of = ROOT

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					event_target:amass_support_flag_temp = {

						is_owned_by_jap_or_its_puppet = yes

					}

				}

				custom_effect_tooltip = gain_public_support_popular_owned_by_jap_tt

				else = {

					custom_effect_tooltip = gain_public_support_popular_owned_by_nat_tt

				}

			}

		}

	}

}

news_event = { #巴黎陷落

	id = AWR_CHI_news.660

	title = snl_news.5.t

	desc = snl_news.5.desc

	picture = GFX_news_event_german_soldiers

	major = yes

	trigger = {

		16 = { is_controlled_by = PRC }

		16 = { is_owned_by = FRA }

		PRC = { has_war_with = FRA }

		NOT = { has_global_flag = PRC_flag_fall_of_paris }

	}

	immediate = {

		set_global_flag = PRC_flag_fall_of_paris

	}

	mean_time_to_happen = {

		days = 2

	}

	option = {

		name = snl_news.5.a

		trigger = {

			NOT = {

				is_in_faction_with = FRA

				TAG = PRC

				TAG = FRA

			}

		}

	}

	option = {

		name = snl_news.5.b

		trigger = { TAG = PRC }

	}

	option = {

		name = snl_news.5.c

		trigger = { 

			or = {

				is_in_faction_with = FRA

				TAG = FRA 

			}

		}

	}

}

					target = root

				}

			}

		}

			}

			}

		}

			target = FROM

			transfer_troops = yes

		}

		limit = {

			is_ai = yes

			FROM = {

				is_ai = no

			}

		}

		}

	}

country_event = { #jap

	id = AWR_CHI.4002 #德国同意承认“亲善”政权的合法性

	title = PRC_linyuying.6.t

	desc = PRC_linyuying.6.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_riwei	

	trigger = {

	    

	}

	

	is_triggered_only = yes

	fire_only_once = yes

	

	immediate = {

	    

	}

	

	option = {

		name = PRC_linyuying.6.a

		ai_chance = {

			base = 1

		}

		add_political_power = 50

		add_current_party_support_ratio = yes

		

			every_subject_country = {

			    limit = { or = { has_idea = JPG_illegal_regime_1 has_idea = JPG_illegal_regime_2 has_idea = JPG_illegal_regime_3 has_idea = JPG_illegal_regime_4 has_idea = JPG_illegal_regime_5 } }

				JPG_illegal_regime_level_down = yes

				JPG_illegal_regime_level_down = yes

				add_political_power = 150

				add_stability = 0.15

				add_war_support = 0.15

				add_opinion_modifier = { target = GER modifier = chengrenhefaxing }

				GER = { add_opinion_modifier = { target = PREV modifier = chengrenhefaxing } }

				GER = { every_other_country = { limit = { is_in_faction_with = GER } add_opinion_modifier = { target = PREV modifier = chengrenhefaxing } } }

			}

			

		GER = { add_opinion_modifier = { target = JAP modifier = Nations_friendly } }

		JAP = { add_opinion_modifier = { target = GER modifier = Nations_friendly } }

		

	}

	

}

country_event = { #

	id = AWR_CHI.4005 #民国的未来

	title = PRC_linyuying.4.t

	desc = PRC_linyuying.4.desc

	

	trigger = {

	    has_country_flag = CHI_return_to_mainland_be_selected

	}

	

	is_triggered_only = yes

	fire_only_once = yes

	

	immediate = {

	    

	}

	

	option = {

		name = PRC_linyuying.4.a

		ai_chance = {

			base = 100

		}

		add_stability = 0.05

		add_popularity = { ideology = democratic popularity = 0.1 }

		if = {

		limit = { not = { has_completed_focus = CHI_constitution_focus } }

		complete_national_focus = CHI_constitution_focus

		}

		complete_national_focus = CHI_end_political_tutelage_focus

	}

	option = {

		name = PRC_linyuying.4.b

		ai_chance = {

			base = 0

		}

		trigger = {

		    NOT = {

				has_global_flag = Three_Principle_Youth_Corps_established

			}

		}

		add_war_support = 0.05

		add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = 0.5 }

		complete_national_focus = CHI_axis_help_party_focus

	}

	option = {

		name = PRC_linyuying.4.c

		ai_chance = {

			base = 0

		}

		add_political_power = 50

		if = {

		limit = { CKS_in_charge = yes }

		add_ideas = chi_jiangjiawangchao

		set_country_leader_portrait = {

		    portrait = "gfx/leaders/CHI/chiang_win.png"

		}

		CHI_chiang_kai_shek = {

		set_portraits = {

			army={

				large="gfx/leaders/CHI/chiang_win.png"

			}

		}

	    }

		}

	}

}

	}

		text = PRC_linyuying.1.descnomao

		trigger = {

			leader_is_maoist = no

		}

	}

	

	trigger = {

	    OR = {

            TAG = event_target:WTT_communist_china

            TAG = PRC

        }

		has_character = PRC_linyuying

		date > 1942.3.5

		date < 1943.1.1

	}

	

	fire_only_once = yes

	

	immediate = {

	    hidden_effect = {

		PRC_lin_biao = { unit_leader_event = { id = linbiao.2 } }

        }

	}

	

	option = {

		name = PRC_linyuying.1.a

		ai_chance = {

			base = 100

		}

		retire_character = PRC_linyuying

		add_political_power = -15

		set_temp_variable = { temp_member = 2 }

		set_temp_variable = { temp_seats = -0.03 tooltip = MAOIST_faction_support_tt }

		modify_parliament_seat = yes

	}

			type = arms_factory level = 12

		    }

			add_offsite_building = {

			type = industrial_complex level = 7

		    }

		    var = This.supply_condition

			value = 500 #MODDED

		}

		add_to_variable = {

			var = This.supply_condition_base

			value = 500 #MODDED

		}

		add_to_variable = {

			Root.supply_condition_base = 500

			}

				}

				set_cosmetic_tag = GER_erwin_rommel_in_africa

				

				create_corps_commander = {

					name = GER_erwin_rommel

					portrait_path = "gfx/leaders/GER/longmer.jpg"

					traits={ brilliant_strategist career_officer adaptable rising_young_officer desert_fox trait_reckless media_personality armor_officer war_hero trickster }

					skill = 5

					attack_skill = 6

					defense_skill = 4

					planning_skill = 5

					logistics_skill = 5

				}

				

				random_country = {

					limit = {

						has_country_flag = GER_erwin_rommel_in_africa

					}                     

					GER = {

						puppet = PREV

					}

					if = {

					limit = { GER = { has_government = fascism } }

					add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = 1 }

					}

					if = {

					add_popularity = { ideology = neutrality popularity = 1 }

					}

				}

				}

					ruling_party = fascism

					elections_allowed = no

				}

				set_popularities = {

					fascism = 100

		            communism = 0

		            neutrality = 0

				    democratic = 0

				}

				set_party_name = {

					ideology = fascism

					name = "德意志非洲军团总司令部"

					long_name = "德意志非洲军团总司令部"

				}

				create_country_leader = { #Safe because Sokolovsky doesn't exist ingame

				   name=GER_erwin_rommel

				   picture = "gfx/leaders/GER/longmer.jpg"

				   ideology = nazism

				   traits = { shamozhihu }

			    }

				create_country_leader = { #Safe because Sokolovsky doesn't exist ingame

				   name=GER_erwin_rommel

				   picture = "gfx/leaders/GER/longmer.jpg"

				   ideology = despotism

				   traits = { shamozhihu }

			    }

				set_cosmetic_tag = GER_erwin_rommel_in_africa

				}

				

				if = {

				limit = {

				GER = { has_government = neutrality }

				}

				set_politics = {

					ruling_party = neutrality

					elections_allowed = no

				}

		            neutrality = 100

				}

					ideology = neutrality

					name = "德意志非洲军团总司令部"

				transfer_state = 1064

				add_state_core = 50

				transfer_state = 50

				set_capital = { state = 42 }

				}

				set_cosmetic_tag = FRA_occupation_of_ger

				

				random_country = {

					limit = {

						has_country_flag = FRA_occupation_of_ger

					}                     

					FRA = {

						puppet = PREV

					}

					add_popularity = { ideology = democratic popularity = 1 }

				}

				

				if = {

				limit = {

				FRA = { is_democratic_type = yes }

				}

				set_politics = {

					ruling_party = democratic

					elections_allowed = no

				}

				set_popularities = {

					fascism = 0

		            communism = 0

		            neutrality = 0

				    democratic = 100

				}

				set_party_name = {

					ideology = democratic

					name = "盟国管制委员会"

					long_name = "盟国管制委员会"

				}

				create_country_leader = { #Safe because Sokolovsky doesn't exist ingame

				   name="让·拉特尔·德·塔西尼"

				   picture = "gfx/leaders/WGR/Marie_Governor.dds"

				   ideology = liberalism

				   traits = { ally_Officer }

			    }

				set_cosmetic_tag = FRA_occupation_of_ger

				}

				

				every_state = {

				limit = {

				NOT = { state = 42 }

				NOT = { state = 1064 }

				NOT = { state = 50 }

				}

				event_target:FRA_occupation_of_ger = { remove_state_core = PREV }

				}

				

			    }

				

			}

	}

	

	option = {

		

	}

}

		}

		}

			type = infantry_equipment

			amount = 500

			producer = SHX

		}

		add_to_variable = { ammunition_variable = 6 }

			

		add_equipment_to_stockpile = {

			type = artillery_equipment

			amount = 25

			producer = SHX

		}

		add_equipment_to_stockpile = {

			type = support_equipment

			amount = 50

			producer = SHX

		}

		

		hidden_effect = {

		if = {

			limit = { has_country_flag = show_effect_tooltips }

				effect_tooltip = {

					add_political_power = 150

					army_experience = 30

					add_doctrine_cost_reduction = {

                        name = defensive_border_conflict_won

                        cost_reduction = 0.5

                        uses = 1

                        category = land_doctrine

                    }

				}

			}

			clr_country_flag = show_effect_tooltips

		}

		}

	}

}

	}

		trigger = {

			NOT = {

			has_global_flag = kairo_meeting_chi_want_Okinawa 

			has_global_flag = kairo_meeting_eng_return_hk 

			}

		}

	}	

	desc = {

		text = news.1027.d3

		trigger = {

			has_global_flag = kairo_meeting_eng_return_hk

		}

	}

	

	picture = GFX_event_Cairo_conference

	is_triggered_only = yes

	set_global_flag = kairo_meeting_happen

	}

		name = news.1027.a

		trigger = {

			or = { has_idea = lianheguojiaxuanyan faction_leader = { has_idea = lianheguojiaxuanyan } }

		}

		if = {

		limit = { tag = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader }

		set_major = yes

		}

	}

		}

			TAG = JAP

			is_in_faction_with = JAP

			}

			or = {

			has_government = fascism

			has_government = neutrality

			}

			has_offensive_war = yes

			}

			}

		}

		add_war_support = -0.025

	}

	

	option = {

		name = zizhinews.25.c

		trigger = {

			NOT = {

			OR = {

			has_war_with = GER

			is_democratic_type = yes

			TAG = GER

			is_in_faction_with = GER

			has_war_together_with = GER

			has_government = fascism

			and = {

			or = {

			TAG = JAP

			is_in_faction_with = JAP

			}

			or = {

			has_government = fascism

			has_government = neutrality

			}

			has_offensive_war = yes

			}

			}

			}

		}

		add_war_support = 0.01

	}

}

	}

				limit = {

				    OR = {		

					tag = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader

					is_in_faction_with = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.4358

	title = wtt_britain.27.t

	desc = wtt_britain.27.d

	picture = GFX_report_event_generic_sign_treaty1



	is_triggered_only = yes

	

	#bombard!

	option = {

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 100#guo

		}

		name = wtt_britain.27.a

		add_popularity = { ideology = democratic popularity = -0.05 }

		add_war_support = 0.05

		random_other_country = {

			limit = {

				original_tag = FRA

				has_government = fascism

			}

			add_war_support = 0.05

			add_opinion_modifier = {

				target = ROOT

				modifier = FRA_mers_el_kebir

			}

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				GER = { has_government = fascism }

			}

			GER = { add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = 0.05 } }

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				GER = { has_government = neutrality }

			}

			GER = { add_popularity = { ideology = neutrality popularity = 0.05 } }

		}

		USA = { set_country_flag = mers_el_kebir_raid }

		hidden_effect = {

			news_event = { id = AWR_CHI_news.834 days = 1 }

		}

		random_list = {

			60 = {

				random_other_country = {

					limit = {

						original_tag = FRA

						has_government = fascism

					}

					destroy_ships = {

						type = ship_hull_light

						count = 1

					}

					destroy_ships = {

						type = ship_hull_heavy

						count = 1

					}

				}

			}

			30 = {

				random_other_country = {

					limit = {

						original_tag = FRA

						has_government = fascism

					}

					destroy_ships = {

						type = ship_hull_light

						count = 2

					}

					destroy_ships = {

						type = ship_hull_heavy

						count = 2

					}

				}

			}

			10 = {

				random_other_country = {

					limit = {

						original_tag = FRA

						has_government = fascism

					}

					destroy_ships = {

						type = ship_hull_light

						count = 4

					}

					destroy_ships = {

						type = ship_hull_heavy

						count = 3

					}

				}

			}

		}

	}

	#let it go

	option = {

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 0#guo

			modifier = {

				factor = 0

				FROM = { has_opinion = { target = ENG value < -99 } }

			}

			modifier = {

				factor = 1.5

				FROM = { has_opinion = { target = ENG value > -50 } }

			}

			modifier = {

				factor = 1.5

				FROM = { has_opinion = { target = ENG value > -25 } }

			}

			modifier = {

				factor = 2

				FROM = { has_opinion = { target = ENG value > 0 } }

			}

		}

		name = wtt_britain.27.b

		add_war_support = -0.05

	}

}

	id = AWR_CHI.4383

	title = wtt_china_shared.10.t

	desc = { text = wtt_china_shared.10.desc_a trigger = { FROM = { has_idea = CHI_soong_mei_ling } } }

	picture = GFX_report_event_china_flying_tigers



	is_triggered_only = yes



	option = { #accept

		name = wtt_china_shared.10.a

			base = 70

			modifier = {

					NOT = {

						has_government = fascism

					}

				}

				factor = 0.5

			}

			modifier = {

				has_war_support < 0.5

				factor = 2

			}

			modifier = {

				FROM = {

					has_idea = CHI_soong_mei_ling

				}

				factor = 2 #this nice lady wants to buy some fighter planes, who are we to tell her no? So what if she has no money?

			}

		}

		set_country_flag = CHI_flying_tigers

		add_war_support = 0.05

		add_ai_strategy = {

			type = send_volunteers_desire

			id = ROOT 	## MODDED?

			value = 200

		}

		add_ai_strategy = {

			type = support

			id = ROOT 	## MODDED?

			value = 200

		}

		hidden_effect = {

			news_event = { id = AWR_CHI_news.872 days = 1 }

		}

		unlock_decision_tooltip = CHI_flying_tigers

	}



	option = { #refuse

		name = wtt_china_shared.10.b

		ai_chance = {

			base = 30

		}

		reverse_add_opinion_modifier = { target = FROM modifier = CHI_refused_support }

		add_war_support = -0.1

		JAP = {

			add_opinion_modifier = { target = USA modifier = large_increase }

		}

	}

}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.4423 #[From.GetNameDefCap]谋求支持

	title = wtt_political_warlord_support.1.t

	desc = wtt_political_warlord_support.1.desc

	picture = GFX_report_event_political_hearing #MODDED



	is_triggered_only = yes



	immediate = {

		hidden_effect = {

			save_event_target_as = warlord_asked_for_support

			FROM = { save_event_target_as = asking_for_support }



			set_variable = { accept_chance = 0 }

			add_to_variable = { accept_chance = support_chance_@FROM }



			set_variable = { reject_chance = 1 }

			subtract_from_variable = { reject_chance = support_chance_@FROM }



			clear_variable = support_chance_@FROM

		}

	}



	#Support

	option = {

		name = wtt_political_warlord_support.1.a

		ai_chance = {

			base = accept_chance

		}

		set_country_flag = warlord_supports_@FROM

		FROM = {

			country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.4426 }

		}

		WTT_political_struggle_recalculate_support = yes

		clear_variable = accept_chance

		clear_variable = reject_chance

	}



	#Refuse support

	option = {

		name = wtt_political_warlord_support.1.b

		ai_chance = {

			base = reject_chance

		}

		FROM = { country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.4432 } }

		clear_variable = accept_chance

		clear_variable = reject_chance

	}

}

country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.4432 }

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.4428 #[From.GetNameDefCap]谋求支持

	title = wtt_political_warlord_support.1.t

	desc = wtt_political_warlord_support.10.desc

	picture = GFX_report_event_political_hearing #MODDED



	is_triggered_only = yes



	immediate = {

		hidden_effect = {

			save_event_target_as = warlord_asked_for_support

			FROM = { save_event_target_as = asking_for_support }



			if = {

				limit = { has_variable = increase_from_amount_times_asked_for_support_by_@FROM }

				add_to_variable = { increase_from_amount_times_asked_for_support_by_@FROM = 1 }

			}

			else = {

				set_variable = { increase_from_amount_times_asked_for_support_by_@FROM = 0 }

			}

		}

	}



	#Ask for PP

	option = {

		name = wtt_political_warlord_support.10.a

		ai_chance = {

			base = 1

			modifier = {

				add = 1

				FROM = { is_ai = yes }

			}

			modifier = {

				add = 1

				has_variable = PP_amount_for_support_@FROM

			}

			modifier = {

				factor = 0

				OR = {

					has_variable = xp_amount_for_support_@FROM

					has_variable = equipment_amount_for_support_@FROM

				}

			}

			modifier = { tag = SIK  add = 1 }

		}

		add_to_variable = { step_increase_from_opinion_ideology_@FROM = increase_from_amount_times_asked_for_support_by_@FROM }

		set_temp_variable = { temp_extra_PP_amount = step_increase_from_opinion_ideology_@FROM }

		multiply_temp_variable = { temp_extra_PP_amount = @WARLORD_SUPPORT_PP_STEPS }



		set_variable = { PP_amount_for_support_@FROM = @WARLORD_SUPPORT_PP_BASE_COST }



		set_variable = { PP_amount_gained_from_supporting_@FROM = @WARLORD_SUPPORT_PP_BASE_COST }

		add_to_variable = { PP_amount_gained_from_supporting_@FROM = @WARLORD_SUPPORT_PP_STEPS }



		add_to_variable = { PP_amount_for_support_@FROM = temp_extra_PP_amount }



		FROM = { country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.4433 } }

		clear_variable = step_increase_from_opinion_ideology_@FROM

	}



	#Ask for equipment

	option = {

		name = wtt_political_warlord_support.10.b

		ai_chance = {

			base = 0

			modifier = {

				add = 1

				has_variable = equipment_amount_for_support_@FROM

			}

			modifier = {

				factor = 0

				OR = {

					has_variable = xp_amount_for_support_@FROM

					has_variable = PP_amount_for_support_@FROM

				}

			}

			modifier = { tag = GXC  add = 1 }

		}

		add_to_variable = { step_increase_from_opinion_ideology_@FROM = increase_from_amount_times_asked_for_support_by_@FROM }



		set_temp_variable = { temp_extra_equipment_amount = step_increase_from_opinion_ideology_@FROM }

		multiply_temp_variable = { temp_extra_equipment_amount = @WARLORD_SUPPORT_EQUIPMENT_STEPS }

		set_variable = { equipment_amount_for_support_@FROM = @WARLORD_SUPPORT_EQUIPMENT_BASE_COST }

		add_to_variable = { equipment_amount_for_support_@FROM = temp_extra_equipment_amount }



		set_temp_variable = { temp_extra_manpower_amount = step_increase_from_opinion_ideology_@FROM }

		multiply_temp_variable = { temp_extra_manpower_amount = @WARLORD_SUPPORT_MANPOWER_STEPS }

		set_variable = { manpower_amount_for_support_@FROM = @WARLORD_SUPPORT_MANPOWER_BASE_COST }

		add_to_variable = { manpower_amount_for_support_@FROM = temp_extra_manpower_amount }



		clear_variable = step_increase_from_opinion_ideology_@FROM



		FROM = { country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.4434 } }

	}



	#Ask for manpower and officers to train them

	option = {

		name = wtt_political_warlord_support.10.c

		ai_chance = {

			base = 0

			modifier = {

				add = 1

				has_variable = xp_amount_for_support_@FROM

			}

			modifier = {

				factor = 0

				OR = {

					has_variable = equipment_amount_for_support_@FROM

					has_variable = PP_amount_for_support_@FROM

				}

			}

			modifier = { tag = XSM  add = 1 }

			#MODDEDv

			modifier = { tag = NXM  add = 1 }

			modifier = { tag = GSM  add = 1 }

			modifier = { tag = EGM  add = 1 }

			modifier = { tag = SHC  add = 1 }

			modifier = { tag = TNG  add = 1 }

			modifier = { tag = XSM  add = 1 }

			modifier = { tag = HMI  add = 1 }

			modifier = { tag = KHR  add = 1 }

			modifier = { tag = KRS  add = 1 }

			modifier = { tag = ATM add = 1 }

			modifier = { tag = XIA  add = 1 }

			#MODDED^

		}



		add_to_variable = { step_increase_from_opinion_ideology_@FROM = increase_from_amount_times_asked_for_support_by_@FROM }



		set_temp_variable = { temp_extra_xp_amount = step_increase_from_opinion_ideology_@FROM }

		multiply_temp_variable = { temp_extra_xp_amount = @WARLORD_SUPPORT_XP_STEPS }

		set_variable = { xp_amount_for_support_@FROM = @WARLORD_SUPPORT_XP_BASE_COST }

		add_to_variable = { xp_amount_for_support_@FROM = temp_extra_xp_amount }



		set_temp_variable = { temp_extra_manpower_amount = step_increase_from_opinion_ideology_@FROM }

		multiply_temp_variable = { temp_extra_manpower_amount = @WARLORD_SUPPORT_MANPOWER_STEPS }

		set_variable = { manpower_amount_for_support_@FROM = @WARLORD_SUPPORT_MANPOWER_BASE_COST }

		add_to_variable = { manpower_amount_for_support_@FROM = temp_extra_manpower_amount }



		clear_variable = step_increase_from_opinion_ideology_@FROM



		#step_increase_from_opinion_ideology_@FROM

		FROM = { country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.4435 } }

	}



	#lolnope

	option = {

		name = wtt_political_warlord_support.10.d

		ai_chance = {

			base = 0

		}

		#step_increase_from_opinion_ideology_@FROM

		FROM = { country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.4432 } }

	}

}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.4440 #[From.GetLeader]已准备好交接国家领导权

	title = wtt_take_national_leadership.1.t

	desc = wtt_take_national_leadership.1.desc

	picture = GFX_report_event_public_hearing_2  #MODDED



	is_triggered_only = yes



	immediate = {

		hidden_effect = {

			save_event_target_as = old_leader

			clr_country_flag = wtt_political_struggle

			if = {

				limit = {

					has_cosmetic_tag = CHI_warlord_leader # warlord took over before this happened

				}

				drop_cosmetic_tag = yes

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					tag = CHI

				}

				set_cosmetic_tag = CHI_power_struggle_defeated

			}

			FROM = {

				save_event_target_as = new_leader

				if = {

					limit = {

						not = {  #MODDEDv

							OR = {

								has_government = n_socialism

								has_government = communism

							} # PRC branch to political struggle

						}  #MODDED^

					}

					CHI_negative_spirit_transfer = yes

				}

				if = {

					limit = {

						has_cosmetic_tag = CHI_power_struggle_defeated

					}

					drop_cosmetic_tag = yes

				}

				clear_global_event_target = WTT_current_china_leader

				save_global_event_target_as = WTT_current_china_leader

			}

		}

	}



	#Accept

	option = {

		clr_global_flag = wtt_national_leadership_takeover_in_progress

		name = wtt_take_national_leadership.1.a

		ai_chance = {

			base = 5

		}



		every_country = {

			limit = { has_war_with = ROOT }

			FROM = { add_to_war = { targeted_alliance = ROOT enemy = PREV hostility_reason = asked_to_join } }

		}



		FROM = {

			country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.4443 }

			annex_country = { target = ROOT transfer_troops = yes }

			hidden_effect = {

				news_event = { id = AWR_CHI_news.883 days = 3 }

			}

			WTT_political_struggle_recalculate_support = yes

		}

		custom_effect_tooltip = GAME_OVER_TT

	}



	#Refuse

	option = {



		name = wtt_take_national_leadership.1.b

		ai_chance = {

			base = 0

		}



		hidden_effect = {

			if = {

				limit = {

					is_faction_leader = yes

					is_in_faction_with = FROM

				}

				every_country = {

					limit = { is_in_faction_with = ROOT }

					ROOT = { remove_from_faction = PREV }

				}

			}

			else_if = {

				limit = {

					is_in_faction_with = FROM

				}

				random_country = {

					limit = { is_in_faction_with = ROOT }

					remove_from_faction = ROOT

				}

			}



			#End political struggle

			every_country = {

				limit = { has_country_flag = wtt_political_struggle }

				WTT_political_struggle_pause_current_country = yes

			}

		}





		declare_war_on = { target = FROM type = annex_everything }

		set_global_flag = wtt_war_over_national_leadership

		set_country_flag = wtt_refused_giving_leadership

		clr_global_flag = wtt_national_leadership_takeover_in_progress

		add_ideas = CHI_illegal_regime

		FROM = {

			country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.4444 }

		}

	}

}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.4489

	title = wtt_japan.114.t

	desc = wtt_japan.114.desc

	picture = GFX_report_event_japanese_soldiers_02



	is_triggered_only = yes

	

	option = {

		name = wtt_japan.114.a

		if = {

			limit = {

				MAN = { is_subject_of = ROOT }

			}

			set_autonomy = { target = MAN autonomy_state = autonomy_free }

			if = {

				limit = {

					MEN = { is_subject_of = ROOT }

				}

				MAN = { puppet = MEN }

			}

			MAN = {

				set_cosmetic_tag = MAN_kwantung_army

			}

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				MAN = { has_idea = MAN_kwantung_veto }

			}

			MAN = { remove_ideas = MAN_kwantung_veto }

		}

		add_popularity = { ideology = democratic popularity = 0.1 }

		start_civil_war = {

			ruling_party = democratic

			ideology = fascism

			size = 0.5

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				any_controlled_state = { #MODDED

					is_core_of = KOR

				}

			}

			release = KOR

			set_autonomy = { target = KOR autonomy_state = autonomy_free }

		}

	}

}

			transfer_state = 529

			transfer_state = 530

			transfer_state = 528

			transfer_state = 282

			transfer_state = 533

			transfer_state = 536

			transfer_state = 555

			country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.4505 }

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				SOV = { has_country_flag = sent_volunteers_to_JAP }

			}

			effect_tooltip = {

				SOV = { add_manpower = 105000 }

			}

			country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.4507 }

		}

		annex_country = { target = event_target:jap_civ_loser transfer_troops = yes }

		set_cosmetic_tag = MAN_kwantung_army

	}



	# This is not our fight.

	option = {

		name = wtt_japan.121.b

		ai_chance = {

			base = 0

		}

		FROM = {

			annex_country = { target = event_target:jap_civ_loser }

			country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.4506 }

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				SOV = { has_country_flag = sent_volunteers_to_JAP }

			}

			effect_tooltip = {

				SOV = { add_manpower = 105000 }

			}

			country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.4507 }

		}

	}

}

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.4509

	title = wtt_japan.126.t

	desc = wtt_japan.126.desc

	picture = GFX_report_event_japanese_chinese_surrender



	is_triggered_only = yes

	

	# We accept their surrender.

	option = {

		name = wtt_japan.126.a

		effect_tooltip = {

			if = {

				limit = {

					NOT = {

						MAN = {

							controls_state = 525

							controls_state = 527

						}

					}

				}

				FROM = { release = KOR }

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					524 = {

						is_controlled_by = JAP

					}

				}

				event_target:WTT_current_china_leader = {

					transfer_state = 524

				}

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					event_target:WTT_current_china_leader = { #Chinese United Front

						is_faction_leader = yes

					}

				}

				every_country = {

					limit = {

						is_literally_china = yes

						has_war_with = ROOT

						is_in_faction_with = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader

					}

					every_controlled_state = {

						limit = {

							OWNER = {

							OR = {

									original_tag = JAP

									is_subject_of = JAP

									is_in_faction_with = JAP

								}

								}

							}

						CONTROLLER = {

							transfer_state = PREV

							}

						}

				}

				every_other_country = {

							limit = {

								is_literally_china = yes

						has_war_with = ROOT

						is_in_faction_with = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader

					}

					white_peace = ROOT

				}

			}

			else = {

				every_other_country = {

					limit = {

						is_literally_china = yes

						has_war_with = ROOT

					}

					every_controlled_state = {

						limit = {

							OWNER = {

							OR = {

									original_tag = JAP

									is_subject_of = JAP

									is_in_faction_with = JAP

								}

								}

							}

						CONTROLLER = {

							transfer_state = PREV

						}

							}

						}

				every_other_country = {

					limit = {

						is_literally_china = yes

						has_war_with = ROOT

					}

					white_peace = ROOT

				}

			}

		}

		FROM = {

			country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.4512 }

		}

		set_country_flag = achievement_JAP_sue_for_peace_CHI_completed

		

		ai_chance = {

			factor = 90

		}

	}



	# No surrender! We want total victory!

	option = {

		name = wtt_japan.126.b

		FROM = {

			country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.4516 }

		}

		

		ai_chance = { # If Japan has lots of major enemies, the AI will not make a separate peace

			factor = 10

			modifier = {

				add = 50

				USA = {

					has_war_with = JAP

					NOT = {

						has_war_with = ROOT

					}

				}

			}

			modifier = {

				add = 40

				ENG = {

					has_war_with = JAP

					NOT = {

						has_war_with = ROOT

					}

				}

			}

			modifier = {

				add = 30

				SOV = {

					has_war_with = JAP

					NOT = {

						has_war_with = ROOT

					}

				}

			}

			modifier = {

				add = 20

				FRA = {

					has_war_with = JAP

					NOT = {

						has_war_with = ROOT

					}

				}

			}

			modifier = {

				add = 10

				GER = {

					has_war_with = JAP

					NOT = {

						has_war_with = ROOT

					}

				}

			}

			modifier = {

				add = 10

				HOL = {

					has_war_with = JAP

					NOT = {

						has_war_with = ROOT

					}

				}

			}

			modifier = {

				add = 10

				ITA = {

					has_war_with = JAP

					NOT = {

						has_war_with = ROOT

					}

				}

			}

		}

	}

}

	id = AWR_CHI.4512

	title = wtt_japan.127.t

	desc = wtt_japan.127.desc

	picture = GFX_report_event_japanese_chinese_surrender



	is_triggered_only = yes

	

	# They have accepted.

	option = {

		name = wtt_japan.127.a

		if = {

			limit = {

				NOT = {

					MAN = {

						controls_state = 525

						controls_state = 527

					}

				}

			}

			release = KOR

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				524 = { #Taiwan

					is_controlled_by = JAP

				}

			}

			event_target:WTT_current_china_leader = {

				transfer_state = 524

			}

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				event_target:WTT_current_china_leader = { #Chinese United Front

					is_faction_leader = yes

				}

			}

			every_country = {

				limit = {

					is_literally_china = yes

					has_war_with = ROOT

					is_in_faction_with = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader

				}

				every_controlled_state = {

					limit = {

						OWNER = {

						OR = {

								original_tag = JAP

								is_subject_of = JAP

								is_in_faction_with = JAP

							}

						}

					}

					CONTROLLER = {

						transfer_state = PREV

					}

						}

					}

			every_other_country = {

				limit = {

					is_literally_china = yes

					has_war_with = ROOT

					is_in_faction_with = event_target:WTT_current_china_leader

				}

				white_peace = ROOT

			}

		}

		else = {

			every_other_country = {

				limit = {

					is_literally_china = yes

					has_war_with = ROOT

				}

				every_controlled_state = {

					limit = {

						OWNER = {

						OR = {

								original_tag = JAP

								is_subject_of = JAP

								is_in_faction_with = JAP

							}

							}

						}

					CONTROLLER = {

						transfer_state = PREV

					}

				}

			}

			every_other_country = {

					limit = {

						is_literally_china = yes

				has_war_with = ROOT

					}

				white_peace = ROOT

				}

			}

		hidden_effect = {

			set_truce = {

				target = PRC

				days = 730

			}

			set_truce = {

				target = CHI

				days = 730

			}

			set_truce = {

				target = XSM

				days = 730

			}

			set_truce = {

				target = SHX

				days = 730

			}

			set_truce = {

				target = GXC

				days = 730

			}

			set_truce = {

				target = YUN

				days = 730

			}

			set_truce = {

				target = SIK

				days = 730

			}

		}

	}

}

		}

					#chi is also war with JAP, no need transfer taiwan

						NOT = {

							has_war_with = JAP

						}

					}

					##

					524 = {

						is_controlled_by = JAP

					}

				}

				transfer_state = 524

			}

			every_state = {

				limit = {

					is_controlled_by = PREV

					is_owned_by_jap_or_its_puppet = yes

				}

				every_country = {

					limit = {

						original_tag = MAN

						has_war_with = FROM

						controls_state = PREV

					}

					transfer_state = PREV

				}

			}

			white_peace = FROM

			FROM = {

				release = KOR				

			}		## MODDED^^^^	

		}

news_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI_news.878 #苏伊士运河被炸

	title = wtt_news.40.t

	desc = {

		text = wtt_news.40.desc_eng

		trigger = {

			FROM = {

				has_country_flag = blew_up_suez

				owns_state = 446

				#owns_state = 453

			}

		}

	}

	desc = {

		text = wtt_news.40.desc_not_eng

		trigger = {

			FROM = {

				OR = {

					NOT = {	has_country_flag = blew_up_suez }

					NOT = {

						owns_state = 446

						#owns_state = 453

					}

				}

			}

		}

	}

	picture = GFX_news_event_020



	is_triggered_only = yes

	major = yes

	

	option = {

		name = wtt_news.40.a

		trigger = {

			NOT = { has_country_flag = blew_up_suez }

			owns_state = 446

			#owns_state = 453

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				original_tag = ENG

			}

			add_war_support = -0.05

			add_stability = -0.05

		}

	}

	option = {

		name = wtt_news.40.b

		trigger = {

			has_country_flag = blew_up_suez

			owns_state = 446

			#owns_state = 453

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				original_tag = ENG

			}

			add_war_support = -0.05

			add_stability = -0.05

		}

		clr_country_flag = blew_up_suez

	}

	option = {

		name = wtt_news.40.c

		trigger = {

			any_country = {

				has_war_with = ROOT

				owns_state = 446

				#owns_state = 453

				has_country_flag = blew_up_suez

			}

		}

	}

	option = {

		name = wtt_news.40.d

		trigger = {

			any_country = {

				has_war_with = ROOT

				owns_state = 446

				#owns_state = 453

			}

			has_country_flag = blew_up_suez

		}

		clr_country_flag = blew_up_suez

	}

	option = {

		name = wtt_news.40.e

		trigger = {

			any_country = {

				has_war_with = ROOT

				owns_state = 446

				#owns_state = 453

				NOT = { has_country_flag = blew_up_suez }

			}

			any_other_country = {

				has_war_together_with = ROOT

				has_country_flag = blew_up_suez

			}

			NOT = { has_country_flag = blew_up_suez }

		}

	}

	option = {

		name = wtt_news.40.f

		trigger = {

			any_other_country = {

				has_war_together_with = ROOT

				owns_state = 446

				#owns_state = 453

				has_country_flag = blew_up_suez

			}

			NOT = { has_country_flag = blew_up_suez }

		}

	}

	option = {

		name = wtt_news.40.g

		trigger = {

			any_country = {

				has_war_with = ROOT

				has_country_flag = blew_up_suez

			}

			any_other_country = {

				has_war_together_with = ROOT

				owns_state = 446

				#owns_state = 453

				NOT = { has_country_flag = blew_up_suez }

			}

			NOT = { has_country_flag = blew_up_suez }

		}

	}

	option = {

		name = wtt_news.40.h

		trigger = {

			NOT = {

				any_country = {

					has_war_with = ROOT

					has_country_flag = blew_up_suez

				}

			}

			NOT = {

				any_other_country = {

					has_war_together_with = ROOT

					owns_state = 446

					#owns_state = 453

country_event = {

	id = AWR_CHI.4523

	title = wtt_prc.1.t

	desc = wtt_prc.1.desc

	picture = GFX_report_event_china_chiang_mao



	is_triggered_only = yes



	option = {



		name = wtt_prc.1.a #approve

		ai_chance = {

			base = 50

		}

		hidden_effect = {

			news_event = { id = AWR_CHI_news.910 days = 1 } # United Front forms

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				#MODDED

				#FROM = { has_completed_focus = PRC_coalition_government }

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					NOT = { is_in_faction_with = ROOT }

					FROM = { is_in_faction = no }

				}

				FROM = {

					set_rule = { can_create_factions = yes }

					create_faction_from_template = faction_template_chinese_united_front 

					add_faction_initiative = 1

				}

			}

			else_if = {

				limit = {

					ROOT = { is_faction_leader  = yes }

				}

				ROOT = {

					add_to_faction = FROM

				}

			}

		}

		else_if = {

			limit = {

				#MODDED#FROM = { has_completed_focus = PRC_government_of_national_defense }

			}

			if = {

				limit = {

					NOT = { is_in_faction_with = FROM }

					FROM = { is_in_faction = no }

				}

				FROM = {

					set_rule = { can_create_factions = yes }

					create_faction = PRC_government_of_national_defense

				}

			}

			else_if = {

				limit = {

					ROOT = { is_faction_leader  = yes }

				}

				ROOT = {

					add_to_faction = FROM

				}

				add_ai_strategy = {

					type = alliance

					id = "CHI"

					value = 200

				}

			}

		}

		if = {

			limit = {

				FROM = { is_faction_leader = yes }

			}

			FROM = { add_to_faction = ROOT }

			add_ai_strategy = {

				type = alliance

				id = "PRC"

				value = 200

			}

			every_country = {

				limit = {

					is_subject_of = ROOT

				}

				ROOT = { add_to_faction = PREV }

			}

		}

	}



	option = {

		name = wtt_prc.1.b #disapprove

		ai_chance = {

			base = 10

			modifier = {

				is_historical_focus_on = yes

				factor = 0

			}

		}

		reverse_add_opinion_modifier = { target = FROM modifier = CHI_refused_support }

		FROM = {

			country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.4525 days = 3 }

		}

	}

}

news_event = { id = AWR_CHI_news.910 days = 1 }

country_event = { id = AWR_CHI.4525 days = 3 }

		}

		}

	}
